highlights.summary: St. Teresa's College admissions 2025 are open for diploma, UG, and PG courses. Candidates who are interested can apply for their desired course by visiting the official website of the college.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Is St Teresa's College a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: St Teresa's College is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate, M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, M.Des, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BCA, B.Voc, BBM/BMS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, St Teresa's College has a rating of 4.04 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.3 on Campus Life, 3.63 on Placements, 4.38 on Faculty and 3.79 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the intake for offered courses at St Teresa's College?
faqs.answer: The seats availability for offered courses at St Teresa's College goes up to 682.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at St Teresa's College?
faqs.answer: St Teresa's College has been rated 4.38 for Faculty as per the Shiksha verified reviews by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 1085 students were admitted at St Teresa's College and 914 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 914 students 173 were placed with median salary of INR 213000 and 702 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1077 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at St Teresa's Collegeand 895 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 895 students 149 were placed with median salary of INR 240000 and 630 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 235 students were admitted at St Teresa's College and 213 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 213 students 137 were placed with median salary of INR 240000 and 73 students opted for higher studies. A total of 390 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at St Teresa's Collegeand 331 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 331 students 122 were placed with median salary of INR 216000 and 144 students opted for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St Teresa's College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc., M.Com and M.Des. The fee structure for the St Teresa's College programmes is around INR 24,000 to 19,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    St Teresa's College is a good institution for PG Diploma, UG Diploma, Certificate, M.Sc, M.A, M.Com, M.Des, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, BCA, B.Voc, BBM/BMS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at St Teresa's College are Apparel Design, International Business, Biology, Chemistry, Business Analytics, Food & Nutrition, Capital Markets, Fashion Design, Mathematics, Physics.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college for M.Com. Course.

review_content.Placements: College placement rates typically fall between 86 and 92%. A maximum salary of 25 to 30 LPA is offered. The minimum wage that is offered is between 5 and 10 LPA. The typical pay scale is between 13 and 20 LPA. Well-known businesses like Bosch, Qualcomm, and Infosys visit the campus to recruit students from our programme. Seventy to eighty percent of the students received internships at various companies. Top candidates for tax advisers, chartered accountants, and other positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college boasts the best hotels and facilities in all of India, as you can clearly observe. You may also look it up on Google, and you will undoubtedly be shocked. About 200 acres make up this college's vast land area, which is home to numerous laboratories and sizable lots. Additionally, this college has separate residence halls for males and females as well as a gymnasium for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a better college in Ernakulam for the M.Sc. in Botany course.

review_content.Placements: 85 percent of M.Sc. in Botany students got well-placed in college. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average package ranges from 25 -18 LPA. The lowest package is 16 LPA. 61 percent of students got placed in their hometown. Some research institutes visit our college, like Biocon, Syngene International, etc., and offer jobs for many students.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a big library where we can get all books and study material. The college campus offers 24x7 Wi-Fi access. The campus has a mess. The mess food quality is good and at reasonable prices. There is a clinic to get fast medical treatment for free.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a decent infrastructure, but good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: This college has a strong placement record, with almost 90% of students hired by Morgan Stanley, JP Morgan Chase, Moody's Analytics, and many others. Internship opportunities are also quite available. Regarding the package, the median salary is 16 LPA, while the highest is 26 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The College offers us a decent infrastructure. The college has a well-established library, which is a valuable resource for students. Classrooms are generally good, equipped with some smart technology. There is a canteen in the old building and a newer, well-maintained one in the new building. The college also provides us with medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Botany - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college is one of the better options for M.Sc. Botany.

review_content.Placements: About 88% of students received placements in various companies. The highest package was 25 LPA, the average package ranged from 18 to 22 LPA, and the lowest package was 15 LPA. Oxfam India, Bayer CropScience, and Environment Conservation were some of the companies that recruited students. Internships were difficult to obtain in my field of study, but around 76% of students secured internships every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college had good infrastructure in my department. Internet access was always available. All classrooms were digital classrooms. The college labs were well-equipped. All instruments were in good condition and fully functional. The campus had a canteen. The food was really good and healthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: This college is best for M.Com.

review_content.Placements: Overall, jobs are good, with several students having options at the start of hiring. Many are selected for roles in finance, accounting, consulting, data interpretation, and taxation, and many also earn internships during their studies. These awards typically fall into the middle and upper echelons, and many well-established organizations attend the academy each year, providing sustainable opportunities for all departments and industries.
review_content.Faculty: Our college teachers are very helpful and experienced, and most of them cover the subjects thoroughly. Semester tests are more rigorous, and evaluation criteria are more stringent than those of many other colleges, which also affects pass rates. While the curriculum is comprehensive and helps with placement, students must work hard to earn an internship. Most of the teachers are excellent, and although academic excellence is maintained, the exams are always difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Economics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has a positive and supportive environment.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of placement in our course is 73. The highest package salary offered is 9 LPA and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Many students got placements successfully in our batch. 65 percent students received their employment opportunities. Companies like Wipro, Deloitte and Infosys still visit the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a well-equipped infrastructure to support its academic and extracurricular activities. The college, spread over a limited area, has expanded vertically with multiple blocks housing classrooms and other facilities. Key infrastructure includes a library, hostel, auditorium, chapel, e-learning center, council room, gym, seminar hall, and an open-air auditorium.

admission_process.title: St Teresa's College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: St Teresa's College admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 40 programmes.St Teresa's Collegeoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. St Teresa's College admission is done based on scores of exams like NEET PG, CBSE 12th, and Kerala 12th. The university offers over 40 courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in field, such as Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Read more details around St Teresa's College admission in the following article.
At UG, PG and Certificate level, B.Sc., B.A., M.A., etc. are among the top courses offered at St Teresa's College.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is St Teresa's College. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #60 under Colleges category. St Teresa's College excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around St Teresa's College rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2024
6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2025

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, St Teresa's College outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. St Teresa's College's rankings in 'Colleges' category have shown a decreasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, St Teresa's College fell 14 ranks to #60 rank in the 'Colleges' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: St Teresa's College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: This college boasts the best hotels and facilities in all of India, as you can clearly observe. You may also look it up on Google, and you will undoubtedly be shocked. About 200 acres make up this college's vast land area, which is home to numerous laboratories and sizable lots. Additionally, this college has separate residence halls for males and females as well as a gymnasium for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a better college in Ernakulam for the M.Sc. in Botany course.
reviews.review_text: There is a big library where we can get all books and study material. The college campus offers 24x7 Wi-Fi access. The campus has a mess. The mess food quality is good and at reasonable prices. There is a clinic to get fast medical treatment for free.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a decent infrastructure, but good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The College offers us a decent infrastructure. The college has a well-established library, which is a valuable resource for students. Classrooms are generally good, equipped with some smart technology. There is a canteen in the old building and a newer, well-maintained one in the new building. The college also provides us with medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This college is one of the better options for M.Sc. Botany.
reviews.review_text: My college had good infrastructure in my department. Internet access was always available. All classrooms were digital classrooms. The college labs were well-equipped. All instruments were in good condition and fully functional. The campus had a canteen. The food was really good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for M.Com.
reviews.review_text: Overall, jobs are good, with several students having options at the start of hiring. Many are selected for roles in finance, accounting, consulting, data interpretation, and taxation, and many also earn internships during their studies. These awards typically fall into the middle and upper echelons, and many well-established organizations attend the academy each year, providing sustainable opportunities for all departments and industries.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a positive and supportive environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-equipped infrastructure to support its academic and extracurricular activities. The college, spread over a limited area, has expanded vertically with multiple blocks housing classrooms and other facilities. Key infrastructure includes a library, hostel, auditorium, chapel, e-learning center, council room, gym, seminar hall, and an open-air auditorium.

reviews.review_heading: The best college and well-qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: On the campus, Wi-Fi was available almost everywhere. I had well-equipped and well-ventilated laboratories. Classrooms had comfortable chairs, air conditioning, projectors, and switchboards. The library had comfortable seating, air conditioning, and a large selection of books that were pertinent to my study. Any book could be checked out for a few days as well. The mess's food was good, and the canteen was a little better. The health facility provided a variety of drugs and was open 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: There are many opportunities waiting for all. Really gonna enjoy you're college life.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so good. Nice facilities are been provided. Good Wi-Fi connection, classrooms, canteen and the library is so great. The college is having many sports and games. And also each every student csn be a part of any clubs in the college according to your will.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Com. course.
reviews.review_text: The amenities at our college are awesome. Everything we need is provided by our college. The classrooms are excellent. Our college has engineering labs. They have all the necessary equipment. At our college, Wi-Fi is available. The classroom is smart. You will be recommended to a hospital for a positive clinical experience. You'll be asked to pick up neighborhood deliveries. Student talks are offered.

reviews.review_heading: A ten-minute review about my college.
reviews.review_text: I loved the college because the rules and regulations are more liberal and okay than other colleges. Such liberal activities help the students promote their own skills in their passionate careers. The libraries are common for students from all disciplines and include 10,000+ books and other online resources.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for pursuing an M.A. in Economics.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was great. Classrooms were good, and the entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The library was well equipped with many different books for students. Hostel facilities were appreciable. The college provides students with Wi-Fi access. Quality food was provided by the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college gives the best placement offers to students.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a Wi-Fi enabled campus. Classrooms are properly decorated with air conditioning and projectors. A well-stocked library is available with various books. Labs are equipped with many instruments. The mess food is delicious and hygienic, and the college canteen is also good. The college provides health facilities 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for the M.Com. Course.
reviews.review_text: Each department also has a common faculty room and a lecture hall with full air conditioning and standard Wi-Fi. The library is also a great place to study. Our hostels have average infrastructure, as it is old, but the food in the mess and canteens is very good. Also, hotels have sports stadiums.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for the M.Sc. in Physics course.
reviews.review_text: The library is clearly the finest in the nation! The classrooms are excellent, and there is a wide range of sports and extracurricular options available. The festival committees are entirely managed by students. The space is rather simple but certainly not pleasant. The food's quality is outstanding and meticulously attended to. Hostels are quite expensive, and the enrollment procedure is rather straightforward.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for PGDM in Business Analytics Course.
reviews.review_text: Campus has world-class classrooms and a library. Unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi throughout campus. There is a separate mess and canteen for each hostel. Even though there are many restaurants, such as Domino's, Cafe Coffee Day, etc. There is a nice hospital, which is open 24/7. Our college has lots of land,  2 gymnasiums,  11 basketball courts, and more.

review_content.General: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-call ambulance service and nearby Somaiya Hospital. Sports facilities include a large playground, basketball court, gym, and indoor games. Overall, campus provides a comfortable and resourceful learning environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best college for the course!

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is above 80%; it differs as per the list. There are prescribed fees for different years. Companies like Land, JP Morgan, etc., have placement rates of about 70% to 80%, sometimes even 100%. I am a student and very happy with the university!
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best, very peaceful, and clean. The facilities like the library, ladies' rooms, AC canteens, and many more are available. The best quality of food is provided, and there is a wide variety of food. The quality of facilities is the best.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The overall review is 5/5.

review_content.Placements: All students who were interested in placement and didn't want to study further got placements at very good packages. The companies that visit here for placement are also big organizations; for example, one of my friends is in KPMG, one is in PWC, one is in HDFC Bank, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, which is a 5G network. The canteens are very clean and hygienic, and the cost of the food is also affordable and tasty. The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

overview_faqs.question: What is KJ Somaiya College of Arts & Commerce famous for?
overview_faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya college of Arts and commerce is famous for his faculty, infrastructure, Academics, Placement and Sports. This college provides many opportunities for students. Laboratories, sports, library, computing facilities, etc., are some of the facilities provided by KJ Somaiya College of Arts & Commerce. As per the shiksha verified review, the college is rated 4.2/5 which is considered is decent rating.

overview_faqs.question: Is KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce a good college for BA?
overview_faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce has received positive reviews from the alumni and students in terms of placement, infrastructure and faculty. According to the verified Shiksha reviews for KJSAC received from the students, the highest salary offered to the batch of 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and the lowest salary offered stood at INR 2 Lacs per annum. Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce has a good infrastructure. Students can also avail financial aids provided by the University. Hence, this can be considered a decent choice for students seeking BA admission.

overview_faqs.question: Is getting into KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce tough?
overview_faqs.answer: KJSAC admission is entirely merit based. Candidates who want to take admission to any of the undergraduate or postgraduate level programmes at KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce must achieve the minimum cutoff declared by the institute. According to the cutoff data for the year 2023, the last round percentage for General All India category candidates for BA and BCom programmes stood at 84% and 84.5% respectively. The cutoffs so declared may vary every year. KJSAC Cutoffs may even vary for candidates who belong to the reserved category.

review_summary.college_name: K J Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great fests, an amazing campus, and friendly teachers.

content.Placements: The college doesn’t provide any official placement opportunities yet, at least not that I or my peers have heard of. Some students get internships at small companies through the medium of the college, but not officially through the college, rather through connections made in college and so on. Overall, I would say that if placements are the main concern, then there are better colleges to look for. I am not saying this is the worst one, but not all placements are official.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is top-notch, with no complaints. The library is well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. Labs have all the required apparatus. The canteen food is very tasty. The canteen is very clean. Overall, infrastructure is very nice.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Well-rounded college life with good infrastructure and learning environment.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of B.Com students get placed with average packages of 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte, EY, and HDFC. About 60-70% of students secure internships in finance, audit, and banking sectors.
content.Infrastructure: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-call ambulance service and nearby Somaiya Hospital. Sports facilities include a large playground, basketball court, gym, and indoor games. Overall, campus provides a comfortable and resourceful learning environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college for the course!

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is above 80%; it differs as per the list. There are prescribed fees for different years. Companies like Land, JP Morgan, etc., have placement rates of about 70% to 80%, sometimes even 100%. I am a student and very happy with the university!
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best, very peaceful, and clean. The facilities like the library, ladies' rooms, AC canteens, and many more are available. The best quality of food is provided, and there is a wide variety of food. The quality of facilities is the best.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The overall review is 5/5.

content.Placements: All students who were interested in placement and didn't want to study further got placements at very good packages. The companies that visit here for placement are also big organizations; for example, one of my friends is in KPMG, one is in PWC, one is in HDFC Bank, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, which is a 5G network. The canteens are very clean and hygienic, and the cost of the food is also affordable and tasty. The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: An extract of the KJ Somaiya review.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 6.5 LPA, and the average package is 2.5-3 LPA. I'm not sure about the percentage of students placed. The companies that offer placements are TCS, Reliance, HDFC, etc., including Wipro. Roughly 40% of students get placed for internships in the companies mentioned earlier, with stipends ranging from Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 15,000. Roles include Accountant, Business Development Intern, Finance Intern, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good, especially for sports. They have a whole campus, and it’s a great opportunity for anyone who is into sports. They offer a variety of sports like chess, basketball, football, table tennis, and more. The infrastructure is great, with all the greenery, and there are lots of libraries with a variety of books. For the hostel, I would say it's above average, but it’s very expensive. It is available for all courses. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and others are there, but the hostel is kind expensive. The cafeteria is there, but they don't have a variety.

admission_overview.college_name: K J Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fees & Seats

admission_process.title: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admissions 2025are merit based for both the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes and entrance based for the PhD programme. Admission to all theSomaiya college of Arts and Commerce coursesis based on qualifying examination marks.Somaiya college of Arts and Commerce admission 2025for the PhD programme is through Somaiya Vidyavihar University PhD entrance test and Personal Interview.

Candidates who want take admission in any of the certificate, diploma, undergraduate, PG diploma, postgraduate or doctoral programme at KJSAC are required to apply on the official website of the college by furnishing all the necessary details required during the time of application process.KJ Somaiya college admission form2025has been released by the institute.

The college applications are now open for admission. KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce course admission is merit-based for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. Additionally, the admission is entrance based for PhD programme. Find below the key highlights ofKJSAC admission 2025:
kjsac.somaiya.edu.in (Somaiya college of Arts and Commerce website)
Certificate| Diploma| Undergraduate| PG Diploma| Postgraduate| Doctoral

Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission 2025will entirely be merit based for UG and PG programmes while it will be entrance based followed by Personal Interview for PhD programme. Minimum eligibility for UG programme admission atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceis Class 12 and Bachelor’s degree in the relevant stream for admission in PG programme. Given below is the list ofKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commercecourses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 inCommerceorSciencestream with minimum 55% aggregate or equivalent grade.
Master's/ Professional degree with at least 55% aggregate (75% aggregate for candidate seeking admission after BTech/ BE/ BPharma/ MBBS/ BDS/ BAMS/ BHMS/ BSc Hons/ PharmaD programme)
Somaiya Vidyavihar University PhD Entrance Test (SVU-PET) plus Personal Interview

*Graduates of this University in faculties other than faculty of Arts, or candidates who have passed the equivalent examination of another University seeking admission in the MA programme atKJSAC Mumbaiby papers, will have to appear for an eligibility test.

Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce feesis different for the UG, PG and doctoral programmes. The total tuition fees charged by the college for undergraduate programmes for academic year 2023-2024 was INR 2,400 and for the postgraduate programme, it ranges between INR 2,000 and INR 47,975. Given below is the tabular representation of the programme wise fees breakup atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates who get their admission cancelled atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commercecan request for refund of fees after applying in writing for cancellation of their admission atSomaiya collegeof Arts and Commerce. Once the cancellation application is made, the institute will refund the percentage of fees to candidates after deducting some charges. The charges so deducted by the college will depend on the factor that when the application of cancellation of admission is made by candidates. Find below the detailed fees deduction policy atKJSAC Mumbai:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The college has different seat intake criteria for various programmes. The total seat intake for the UG programmes ranges from 360 to 1,080 and the total seat intake for PG programmes atKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceranges from 60 to 300. Given below is the tabular representation ofSomaiya college of Arts and Commerceseat intake for different courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Somaiya College of Arts and Commercehas a seat reservation policy which is followed both for the undergradaute and postgraduate programmes. The college has reserved 50% of the total seat intake for the Gujarati linguistics candidates and 3% seats for other government category candidates. The remaining 42% of the total seat intake here is reserved for open and all reserved category candidates. Mentioned below is the seat reservation policy atKJSAC Mumbai:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
* Open and all reserved category includes General and (DT/ NT1/ NT2/ NT3/ OBC/ SBC/ SC/ ST).

**Government Others category includes physically handicapped/ cultural and sports (National and State level winners)/ widow/ divorcee women/ wards of ex- servicemen/ transferred Government employees/ existing and former defense person).

KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission process 2025is a multi-step process. Admission in the undergraduate and postgraduate programmes are merit based and candidates who want to take admission in any of the programme offered byKJSACare required to follow certain steps. Mentioned below is theSomaiya College of Arts and Commerce admission process 2025:
STEP 1: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Application Process 2025

Candidates are first required to visit the official website ofSomaiya College of Arts and Commerce: kjsac.somaiya.edu.in and fill out online Pre-admission form* along with the payment of non-refundable and non-transferable application fees.
STEP 2: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Selection Criteria 2025
A merit list is then released as per the schedule on the website as prescribed by theUniversity of Mumbai.

STEP 3:Candidates shortlisted as per the merit list can then collect the blank admission form by providing pre-admission form cash payment receipt. As a part of this step, they must also fill the form and attach all necessary documents.
STEP 4: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Counselling and Seat Allotment

All the document submitted by candidates are verified byKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerceand an ID number will be generated on the college counter and the final step of theKJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce Admission process 2025will be the payment of fees through online mode.Check KJSAC Cutoffs.
*It is mandatory to fill out the Pre-admission online enrolment form on the University website before applying for the course.

description: KJSAC cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to undergraduate courses. The cutoff has been provided in the form of percentages for different categories of students. The cutoff lists are published separately for all colleges affiliated with Mumbai University on their official website. Students whose names appear on the merit list must report to the college to confirm their seats. Aspirants seeking admission can refer to the sections below to view the course, specialisations, and category-wise cutoff details. Further information is provided below:

KJSAC 2025 merit list was released for various courses at the UG and PG levels. The cutoff for most of the courses was released based on students' last qualifying exam. The cutoff ranks vary for different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories.

During the KJSAC cutoff 2025 in the last round, the cutoff percentage varied between 40.67 and 60 for General AI category students. Of all the courses, the one that had the highest cutoff was , followed by the , with the last round cutoff

At the UG level, KJSAC offers B.A., B.Com and other courses. For B.A. admission across multiple specialisations, the 2025 last round cutoff percentage was 40.67. Of all the courses, B.A. in Psychology was the most competitive for admission.
More cutoff-related details on round, year and category-wise data, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Great fests, an amazing campus, and friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is top-notch, with no complaints. The library is well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. Labs have all the required apparatus. The canteen food is very tasty. The canteen is very clean. Overall, infrastructure is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded college life with good infrastructure and learning environment.
reviews.review_text: KJ Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce offers excellent infrastructure for B.Com students, including spacious classrooms with projectors, campus-wide Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Computer lab supports learning tools like tally and MS excel. Hostels are clean and well-maintained with shared rooms, regular housekeeping, and basic furniture. Mess provides hygienic, average-tasting food with multiple options. Canteens and cafes are also available on campus. Medical needs are handled by an on-...

reviews.review_heading: Best college for the course!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, very peaceful, and clean. The facilities like the library, ladies' rooms, AC canteens, and many more are available. The best quality of food is provided, and there is a wide variety of food. The quality of facilities is the best.

reviews.review_heading: The overall review is 5/5.
reviews.review_text: Our college has its own Wi-Fi, which is a 5G network. The canteens are very clean and hygienic, and the cost of the food is also affordable and tasty. The library is quiet and the best place for people who love to read books because they have thousands of books for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: An extract of the KJ Somaiya review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good, especially for sports. They have a whole campus, and it’s a great opportunity for anyone who is into sports. They offer a variety of sports like chess, basketball, football, table tennis, and more. The infrastructure is great, with all the greenery, and there are lots of libraries with a variety of books. For the hostel, I would say it's above average, but it’s very expensive. It is available for all courses. All facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, and others are ther...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent Academics, Good Placements, and Great Infrastructure!
reviews.review_text: K J Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce boasts excellent infrastructure, including a well-stocked library, modern labs, spacious classrooms, and an auditorium. Hostel facilities offer comfortable accommodation and hygienic food. Medical facilities, a sports complex, a gym, and campus-wide Wi-Fi connectivity cater to students' overall development.

reviews.review_heading: More Placement opportunities should be Given, satisfied with the Faculty .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is somewhat old-fashioned, and the facilities are basic. Sometimes classrooms are not clean, and they haven't provided the Wi-Fi password. The library is average, but the books are helpful before exams, especially with the book bank scheme. The computer lab is good, and the teachers are helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Somaiya: One stop solution for all your business studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are good to go. The hostel is very well-defined and good in infrastructure. There is also a Xerox center available in the college building itself, which provides great support for all your documentation. Overall, a good experience, though it can be much better.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing College but disappointed with the office staff because they are the most irritating.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fabulous; there are lots and lots of facilities available. The campus is huge, and the canteen is so huge with so many options to choose from. The quality of food is also so good, and sports and games are also nicely managed and played there.

reviews.review_heading: KJSAC: worth the social life.
reviews.review_text:
I can not say much about hostel as I am not living there but as for classes, I think the infrastructure is good and satisfactory. 
Somaiya has the biggest campus with various different colleges in it, each specializing in their own. 
There are 6-7 canteens on campus with good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Actually it's a very good college with a good campus and good canteen with good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: It's a very good college in the first place. The facilities provided by the college is so good and the teaching staff are also good and specially the campus is so huge. I like the library facility so much because whenever you sit in a girls reading room, you feel so much at peace.

reviews.review_heading: This provides a short glimpse of K. J. Somaiya College of Arts and Commerce.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there were a total of 32 institutes where the infrastructure was no less than that of a society. The food and infrastructure were excellent. The course had many professors who graduated from prestigious universities, including abroad. Overall, it was an amazing experience.

reviews.review_heading: Somaiya has one of the biggest campuses in Mumbai, and it is a good experience going to the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is more than average. You will get almost all the facilities in the college like good classrooms and Wi-Fi for students. There is a library with separate sections for boys and girls that are open all day. The canteen facilities are excellent and serve numerous varieties of food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in terms of education and sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our library is good and well-set up. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus. Our classrooms are good and comfortable. Sports facilities are good. Coaches are available in our college to help and train us. The hostel is good and has a huge mess facility. The food served in the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, good canteens and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good and large campus with good food, play area, and good infrastructure. We have labs, a library, IT rooms and much more which are very good. We have an athletic ground, badminton court, basketball court, and many more facilities each has good infrastructure.

Taking part in the guest lectures has proven benificial for students as well as teachers.

faqs.answer: A career in media industry requires commitment, dedication and sacrifice of personal time for the sake of staying on front or top, particularly in news industry. A journalist may have to work day in and day out to get breaking news. Similarly, media professionals who are in entertainment or film making need to work with passion which may come at the cost of their personal life. However, in a nutshell, Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication degree is enough for a person to fetch a job of any interest in the media field.Few of the areas s/he can choose from, include:TV channelsCirculation and Public RelationsCentral Information ServiceLegal Affairs DepartmentJournalsAIR - All India RadioNews AgenciesPress Information BureauAdvertising agenciesBroadcasting companies.Hopefully, the above information will help you make an informed decision.

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students got placed. The highest package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest package was 1.5 LPA. 90% of students got internships. The faculty are supportive and provide good education and teaching. Lots of amazing events are held here.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.VocCandidate should have passed 10+2 from any government recognised board.UG DiplomaCandidate should have passed 10+2 from any government recognised board.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognized Institute/ University can also apply.
Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth’s College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Bvcoa review - architecture college.
reviews.review_text: The college building is really basic and doesn't look like an architecture college. Wi-Fi and labs are good. Studios are also great. Hostel infrastructure is deteriorating, and mess food is not good. Medical facilities are not available on the campus. Lights are also not there on the campus after dark.

reviews.review_heading: The college is great and has the best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean. Toilets are cleaned every day. The library has around 1,000 books that are very helpful. The hostel is average. The canteen serves delicious food. A lot of physical activities, like workshops and sports, are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bharati Vidyapeeth’s College of Architecture -Navi Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: The building is old but quite well managed. The hostel is too good. Our canteen is the best place to hang out. We celebrate each day here. Our hostel is the best here. Connecting with seniors and learning all of it is the best. I had my best experience in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Great exposure for the students but lack good facilities and communication.
reviews.review_text: Overall facilities are not that great. We have cameras in maximum classrooms that is great. We have Wi-Fi but it's never working. Library, seminar room, computer lab and stationery shop all are available. Toilets don't have proper lights and maximum times it's unclean. Drinking water and canteen is also there. Quality of food is okay.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are awesome and college get big opportunity for placement because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Bharati vidyapeeth college has best and also good infrastructure is good and have all the necessary facilities available hostels are also quite good and well maintained food is also very good and hygienic classrooms are also quite good and maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Architecture (M.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am truly satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 75% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Anagram Architects and Sanjay Puri Architects. The top roles offered are interior designer and urban planner. Around 65% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are so nice at this college compared to other colleges. The hotel food is like homemade food. Bedrooms are neat with attached bathrooms. The college infrastructure is above average. Classrooms are in good condition. Facilities are available. The library and labs are good. The canteen is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good placement statistics.

review_content.Placements: Around 75% of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course was 22 LPA. The average package was around 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Around 40% of students got internship offers.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really good. The college has a modern computer lab. Wi-Fi was enabled on the campus. The library was well-stocked with books. Food in the hostel was acceptable. A first aid medical facility was available.

faqs.answer: Thiagarajar Engineering College accepts TNEA entrance exam scores, followed by a counselling process for admission to the BE course. As per the TNEA 2024 last-round cutoff, the closing ranks varied between 1561 and 12483, of which Computer Science and Engineering was the most deasirable BE specialisations among the General AI category students. The second most in-demand specialisation was Electronics and Communication Engineering with a closing cutoff of 2125. To learn more about the BE branch-wise TNEA cutoff ranks, refer to the table below: CourseTNEA Last Round Cutoff 2024 B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering2125B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering4902B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering1561B.E. in Mechanical Engineering11045B.E. in Civil Engineering12483
faqs.question: Q: What is the cut off for Thiagarajar Engineering College 2024?

faqs.answer: Admissions at Thiagarajar College of Engineering (TCE) for undergraduate courses like B.E/B.Tech are carried out through a single window system of Anna University based on the state-wise rank calculated by students' marks in the Higher Secondary Examination conducted by the Department of Education, Government of Tamil Nadu. Reservations are provided for various categories as per the rules of the Government of Tamil Nadu, and admissions are merit-based. For B.Arch degree admission, candidates need to have passed 10+2 with specific marks and obtained a certain score in the NATA test. Overall, admissions at TCE are entrance-based for some programs like B.Arch and merit-based for others like B.E/B.Tech.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions at Thiagarajar College of Engineering entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: Thiagarajar College of Engineering offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. Thiagarajar College of Engineering admissions are held on the basis of both merit and entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as NATA, TANCET, CEETA, GATE, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.
faqs.question: Q: How do I get a seat at Thiagarajar College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Thiagarajar College of Engineering TNEA cutoff 2024 ranged between 1561 and 12483 for BE admission among the General AI quota. So, students with a cutoff of 1035 are eligible to secure a seat at Thiagarajar College of Engineering. Since you have not mentioned in which course you want to take admission, I am considering you don't have any specific course preference. Hence, a list of all the BE specialisations is tabulated below up to a cutoff rank of 1035 for Thiagarajar College of Engineering BE admission through TNEA counselling: CourseTNEA Last Round Cutoff 2024B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering2125B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering4902B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering1561

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee of TNEA Counselling at TCE Madurai?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for TNEA counselling is Rs 500 for the General category and Rs 250 for SC/ST/SCA candidates at TCE Madurai.

overview_faqs.question: Can I get a hostel room at Thiagarajar College of Engineering? If yes, then what is the hostel fee?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, students who are officially pursuing any of the Thiagarajar College of Engineering courses can opt to reside in hostel facilities available at the college. According to the college's official website, the college has built separate hostel facilities for male and female students.Moreover, the official website also states that each male and female hostel is equipped with various necessary amenities. Some of these amenities are electricity and water supply, clean and spacious rooms, and a mess. As per sources collated across the web, the hostel fees is INR 3.32 lakh.Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change.

review_summary.college_name: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with my college for placements and the knowledge gained.

content.Placements: 31 students out of 140 have been placed till now. The average package offered is 4LPA, and the highest package offered is 14LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, Caterpillar, Zoho, Embed your, and so on. A few got internships in TCS and Fidelity. I do not know about the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi can be a little bit better, but the classes and rooms near the outer get good Wi-Fi. Lawns, classrooms, and the library possess a good infrastructure and also better facilities. The mess and canteen offer only veg food, which is also good. Our college gives importance to both sports and studies.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Big college with best placements.

content.Placements: Nearly 85% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Microsoft, and Adobe. The top roles are Project manager and software developer. Around 70% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good and the best. The B.Ed rooms are good with attached bathrooms. Washing machines and gym facilities are available. The canteen is also available. The college infrastructure is good. The classrooms and labs are good. We have a huge library. The Wi-Fi facility is also available. The medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Architecture (M.Arch.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am truly satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Nearly 75% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 18 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Anagram Architects and Sanjay Puri Architects. The top roles offered are interior designer and urban planner. Around 65% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are so nice at this college compared to other colleges. The hotel food is like homemade food. Bedrooms are neat with attached bathrooms. The college infrastructure is above average. Classrooms are in good condition. Facilities are available. The library and labs are good. The canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has good placement statistics.

content.Placements: Around 75% of students were placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course was 22 LPA. The average package was around 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant, etc. Around 40% of students got internship offers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were really good. The college has a modern computer lab. Wi-Fi was enabled on the campus. The library was well-stocked with books. Food in the hostel was acceptable. A first aid medical facility was available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Architecture (M.Arch.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best and popular college.

content.Placements: Approximately 76% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered was 15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Larsen and Toubro and CP Kukreja Architects. Top roles offered were architectural designer and BIM specialist. 65% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was awesome. Classrooms were neat and clean. The labs were good. Wi-Fi facility was also available. Many technical and financial books were available in the library. Hostel facilities were so nice. The hostel food was like home-made food. The canteen was also available.

admission_overview.college_name: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Process, Courses, Application Form, Dates

admission_process.title: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Thiagarajar College of Engineering admission 2025is open for MCA courses. The college offersUG, PG, integrated and doctoral programmessuch as BE, BTech, BArch, Integrated MSc, ME, M.Arch, MCA, MS (By Research) and PhD in various specialisations and disciplines, namely Engineering and Technology, Science and Humanities and Architecture.Thiagarajar College of Engineering courses admissionis based on both merit in the last qualifying examination as well as qualifying for national-level examinations.Thiagarajar College of Engineeringis affiliated withAnna Universityand the admission process is based on the university’s norms.

Applicants who want to be admitted to Thiagarajar College of Engineering must have to appear for entrance and counselling for all the courses. To learn more aboutThiagarajar College of Engineering admission process 2025read the below article:

Thaiagarajar College of Engineering admissionis carried out in an online mode for all the courses. The college provides a full-time mode of study for all the programmes. Applicants seeking admission toTCEmust fill out an online application form by going through the official website of the college. Want to know aboutThiagarajar College of Engineering admission highlightsgo through the table given below:

Thiagarajar College of Engineering admissionsare merit, entrance and counselling based for all courses. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria for the courses they desire to apply. Below are the eligibility criteria along with the TCE accepted entrance exams related toThiagarajar College of Engineering course admissions:
Class 10 and Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate
Class 10 and Class 12 with a good aggregate
Applicants have Mathematics as a subject
Class 10 and Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry
Graduation degree from a recognised board with 50%
Mathematics as a core subject in Class 12
CEETA PG+ CEETA PG Counselling / GATE
Passed post graduation degree with a relevant stream
Know more aboutThaigarajar College of Engineering courses.
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The different components included inThiagarajar College of Engineering feesare tuition fees, hostel fee, registration fees, etc. Candidates shall be able to pay the fee annually or semester-wise. The one-time charges, such as the registration fee have to be paid once at the time of admission. Along with that, the total seat intake may also vary depending upon the course and specialisations. The following table showcases theThiagarajar College of Engineering feebreakupfor various UG & PG courses offered at the college:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Thiagarajar College of Engineering admission process 2025 involves multiple steps that must be completed by all aspirants in order to secure admission into the college. The process starts with the submission of an application, followed by a course-specific entrance exam, and other selection rounds if applicable. After the selection rounds, course-wise selection lists are published on the official website. Applicants who are selected can then submit the necessary fee to confirm their admission. For both undergraduate and postgraduate courses, admission to TCE is based on merit, entrance exams and counselling. Please find below the stages of theadmission procedure of Thiagarajar College of Engineering:
Step 1: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Application Process 2025
Candidates seeking admission to Thiagarajar College of Engineering must submit an online application form atwww.tcarts.in. The application process is conducted entirely online.
Step 2: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Selection Criteria 2025 & Release of Merit List

Once the application window is closed, students will need to take a course-specific entrance exam and possibly other selection rounds as well. In some cases, national-level exam scores will be accepted. Once all selection rounds are complete, course-wise merit lists will be released on the official website.
For courses likeBTech, MArch,MTech and MCA, candidates have to go through a round of counselling and interview, respectively. Only selected candidates can participate in these rounds.

faqs.question: What happens if a student fails internal exams in Thiagarajar College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: If a student fails in the internal exams at Thiagarajar College of Engineering, they'll get the backlog. They can apply for makeup exams if there is a real cause, the sole alternative is to repeat the course or improve if the grade is D. If a student misses an internal exam, they may repeat it if their leave letter is approved by the professor.

faqs.question: Is there any way of applying offline for the Thiagarajar College of Engineering application form?
faqs.answer: Yes, there are ways to apply offline for the Thiagarajar College of Engineering by downloading the form from the official site of the institute.you can send the form to them by post after completing it.You'll need to attach the list of documents asked in the application for verification.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Thiagarajar College of Engineering entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Admissions at Thiagarajar College of Engineering (TCE) for undergraduate courses like B.E/B.Tech are carried out through a single window system of Anna University based on the state-wise rank calculated by students' marks in the Higher Secondary Examination conducted by the Department of Education, Government of Tamil Nadu. Reservations are provided for various categories as per the rules of the Government of Tamil Nadu, and admissions are merit-based. For B.Arch degree admission, candidates need to have passed 10+2 with specific marks and obtained a certain score in the NATA test. Overall, admissions at TCE are entrance-based for some programs like B.Arch and merit-based for others like B.E/B.Tech.

placement_report.college_name: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Placements 2025: Average Package, Highest Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: Thiagarajar College of Engineering Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Thiagarajar College of Engineering placement report 2025 has been out on the official website. The overall highest package offered stood at INR 29 LPA . The average package offered was INR 7.1 LPA . In total, 809 students have been placed from the both the UG and PG programs. The top recruiters include leading companies such as Accenture, Capgemini, Cognizant and many others that were part of the Thiagarajar College of Engineering placements 2025.

Earlier, the highest packages recorded during seasons 2024 and 2023 were INR 21 LPA and INR 32 LPA , respectively. Moreover, the average package recorded were INR 7.25 LPA and INR 7 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 669 students were placed during the 2024 placement drive and 761 students were placed during Thiagarajar College of Engineering placements 2023.

reviews.review_text: In this college, mostly high-quality products are used, and the infrastructure is very good. admission_process.title: Ranchi University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Ranchi University follows a multistep admission process determined by the University. The aspirants must begin their admission process by meeting the course-specific eligibility criteria, followed by submitting the completed application form. After the application process is completed, aspirants are required to go through the predetermined selection criteria, based on which the university shortlists candidates for final admission. Find below the step-wise admission procedure:

The Ranchi University application process is conductedonline on the official websiteof the university. Candidates can either apply directly on the official website or they can download the application form from the website.

The Ranchi University admission criteria is based on merit for some courses and entrance-based for others. Based on the selection criteria set by the University, a merit list is prepared, containing the names of shortlisted candidates, and released on theRanchi University official website.
After successful selection process, candidates can submit their course fee and secure a seat in their preffered course.

Ranchi University fees vary as per the affiliated college. The course fees usually range from INR 2 K to INR 4 L and includes multiple components such as development fees, lab fees, registration fees, etc. Another important factor, a candidate considers before taking admission into any college is placement. courses_data.name: Ranchi University BSc Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: Ranchi University offers a Bachelor of Science (BSc) and BSc (Hons) via its various affiliated colleges. The BSc covers three years with six semesters across multiple specialisations such as Nursing, Biotechnology, Zoology, Computer Application, Mathematics, etc. BSc admission is usually merit based. However, candidates with CUET score will be given preference. Read on to know more about theRanchi University BSc course.

faqs.question: Is CUET compulsory for BSc at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: As per the Ranchi University's official website, CUET is accepted by the university for admission to its PG and UG courses.  As for the BSc porgramme, CUET is indeed required but as per the university's admission guidelines. However, candidates with a valid eligbility criteria is also admitted but  preference will be given to the CUET candidates.Eligibilty Criteria:Twelve years of school education with 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English.

faqs.question: What is the fees for UG courses at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: The cost of attending Ranchi University varies based on the programme and academic level. But generally speaking, the costs are reasonable.Fees is generally between3000-6000 INR depending on course .You can check exact amount of fees course wise onShiksha.com college review .

faqs.question: How are Ranchi University 2023 cut off marks determined?
faqs.answer: The cut-off of various exams differ. The number of candidates appearing and the number of candidates securing the highest marks and ranks are usually the determinant factors of cut-offs. For example, the NEET cut-off percentile is determined by this method-100xNumber of candidates appeared with a raw score equal to less than the candidate/total number of candidates who appeared. However the seat eligibitly may differ from cut-off marks. Cut-off marks may indicate the overall eligibilty of a cand

faqs.question: Are there any seat reservations at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: Yes, seat reservations are based on the caste, gender and also based on the merit of the students at Ranchi University.Caste reservations and also based on the annual income of the students are also to be considerd at Ranchi University.

courses_data.name: Ranchi University BA Admissions 2026
courses_data.description: Ranchi University offers Bachelor's Degrees (BA) across multiple specialisations such s English, Journalism Mass Communication, Political Science, History, etc. The BA programme is offered via university's affiliated colleges. BA admission is usually merit-based. However, candidates with CUET scores will be given preference. Read on to know more about theRanchi University BAcourse.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the BA at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who has qualified class 12 from a recognised unversity with a minimum 45-50 % aggregate is eligible for the BA programme at Ranchi University. The unievrsity offers the BA cousre via its various affiliated colleges. BA Admission is merit basis, candidates with a valid eligibility criteria are considered for the BA admission. However, candidates with a CUET score are given preference. English, History, Political Science, Mas Communication, etc. are few of the specialisations BA offers.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee of BA at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee of BA programme at Ranchi University ranges between INR 24000 to INR 3 lakh. This number is taken from the official website of college. It may change.

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check Ranchi University cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: Ranchi University offers its own official portal for the information and easy convenience of candidates. All information regarding courses, eligibility criterias, seat matix, etc. are available in this portal. The cut-offs for various courses including previous years are also provided in this and can be checked easily. However, the cut-offs of various all India based exams should be checked on the portals of respective conducting authorities.

faqs.question: Can I get into Ranchi University with 70%?
faqs.answer: Eligibility for courses offered by Ranchi University varies accordingly. Most of the courses are entrance based and preferably do not require 12th percentages and are directly based on the scored or percentile scored of the entrance exam concerned. The applications with higher exam scores are generally preferred for seat allocation. However some courses offered are based on merits of previous exam appeared in which 12th percentage maybe considered. Candidates should check previous years cut-off

courses_data.name: Ranchi University MBA Admissions 2026
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, ATMA, XAT, CMAT, CAT
courses_data.description: Ranchi University offers MBA programme via its affiliated colleges. The MBA programme lasts for two years and is offered in a full-time mode. A three year executive MBA is also offered by the University. The executive MBA is conducted in regular classes on weekends covering the same set of core and optional subjects as applicable in case of the regular MBA. Admission to the MBA programme is based on national-level exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, etc. Read on to know more aboutRanchi University MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information for MBA at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: As such no lower cutoff is there for MBA at Ranchi University .You just need to met all eligibility criteria and apply  for programme .Based on your profile and GDPI your result will be declared . Students gets admissions for MBA at Ranchi University easily.

faqs.question: Does Ranchi University releases any merit list for UG admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ranchi University does release a merit list for UG admissions. Once the application window is closed, the admission committee reviews all the applications received and prepares a merit list based on CUET UG results. Applicants without a CUET UG score are reviewed based on Class 12 scores. Once the list is produced, it is released on the official website of the Chancellor's Portal.

faqs.question: Can I join Ranchi University directly?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot join Ranchi University directly. It's only after fulfilling the eligibility criteria of the particular course they can get admission in to this university. Most courses are entrance based and hence, this will require the candidate to appear in that particular exam. Admission will be based on the cut-off margins of the scores obtained in the exam. The candidates are required to then submit application forms into the official portal of the University along with the exam scores. The seats are then alloted according to these applications and score evaluation.

faqs.question: When is Ranchi University application forms out?
faqs.answer: The application forms for various courses offered by Ranchi University usually come out in the official portal of the University. The dates concerning the release of application forms depends on the courses preferred. For any all India entrance exam based course, the forms are out generally after 3-4 weeks after the exam completetion. For other courses for which University conducts merit and entrance exams, the notification regarding it is sent 1-2 months beforehand in the official portal of the University. Candidates should regularly keep tabs on the official site to remain updated with the concerned dates.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: No, you cannot take direct admission to some courses. The Ranchi University has many courses for doctoral ,undergraduates and  postgraduates students. There are many different branches like engineering , medicine , nursing, science, arts , Commerce, and many  more. To get in, you need good scores on the entrance exam and qualifying exam. It also accepts neet , jee main , CAT, and GATE scores ,etc. It's important to review the Ranchi University admission process before applying to a program.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Ranchi University?
faqs.answer: To get an MBA, candidates must check if they meet the requirements. You can study for an MBA in four main subjects. Finance Marketing Human Resources Information Technology To get into the MBA program, you need to pass your Bachelor's exams in any subject with at least 50% marks overall. Also, they need to take CAT, MAT, XAT, NMAT, or CMAT exams. They must join group discussions and personal interviews. The University will consider past work experience and academic records when accepting students. In addition you can contact the college directly for further information

placement_data.title: Ranchi University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Ranchi University placement report 2024 has been out on the official website. The highest package and average package stood at INR 7.25 LPA and INR 4.68 LPA , respectively. In total, 44 students have been placed . Furthermore, the median package and mode package offered during Ranchi University placements 2024 were INR 2.26 LPA and INR 2 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: Does Ranchi University have better placements than Naxatra Institute of Media Studies (NIMS BBSR)?
faqs.answer: Ranchi University was founded in year 1960 whereas Naxatra Institute of media Studies (NIMS BBSR) was established in the year 2009. NIMS claims the highest package of Rs. 12 Lacs and average package of Rs. 4.5 Lacs per annum. NIFR ranking of NIMS is 151. It has academic collaboration with various Indian as well as international universities. According to me, NIMS has better placements specially in media studies.
