hostel_campus.college_name: Ranchi University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by National Institute of Advanced Manufacturing TechnologyReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, only the campus is small, and all other facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are the best. But the quality of food available in the mess is, as you know, average quality. All other medical facilities, sports, and games are best provided here. You also get a medical card, which you can use in any verified hospital for treatment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by National Institute of Advanced Manufacturing TechnologyReviewed on 16 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: The college is really old and authentic. According to fees, the college provides enough.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are well-maintained. Wi-Fi is provided in hostels and everywhere. The library is really big. Ground for sports is provided. The hostel for girls is quite big with mostly double shared rooms and a few triple rooms. Food in the mess is average. As you will be in a hostel, you need to adjust here.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Marwari College, RanchiReviewed on 10 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied only because of placement and not the NIRF ranking.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Marwari College, Ranchi, is average but suitable for B.Com students. Classrooms are spacious and well-ventilated, providing a comfortable learning environment. The library has a sufficient number of commerce-related books, journals, and newspapers, which are helpful for semester exams. Computer facilities are basic but usable. Hostel facilities are available for students, and rooms are clean with basic amenities. Overall, the infrastructure supports regular academic activit...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Doranda College, RanchiReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is for poor students and also for weak students. You can get admission at 50 percent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and you will get quality education

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Doranda College, RanchiReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but teaching method is not good, which is why students do not attend classes.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, classrooms, and labs, but our college does not have a canteen. There is no Wi-Fi available. Our college has smart boards, but teachers do not use them. The timing of B.Com classes is very bad, which is one reason students do not attend regularly. A canteen should be provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by National Institute of Advanced Manufacturing TechnologyReviewed on 4 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: College is good. It is value for money but some further improvements are needed.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old but some buildings are new. There is a computer lab, classrooms are decent but AC is not available in classroom, and a library is there beside the red building where almost all books are available. There is two seater room for the 1st year. One table, one chair and a bed provided by the hostel authority. Mess food is good. It is value for money.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Xavier's CollegeReviewed on 3 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best to start your future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, food canteen, and hostel are available for students who are from the SC/ST region. Good food is available. We have a football area, basketball area, and badminton court. Our canteen has every kind of food, such as dosa, chat, kachori, and beverages.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by St. Xavier's CollegeReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good, but hostel is not good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not so good, food is also not good. Wi-Fi is provided. All over hostel life is not good and you cannot make food in campus; you need to take mess facilities, i.e., not good. Most ST/SC students are in hostel. I suggest take a room in share near to college, easily available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by National Institute of Advanced Manufacturing TechnologyReviewed on 26 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: NIAMT Ranchi has strong academics with scope for modernization.
reviews.review_text: College has a fully residential green campus with a well equipped academic block and modern manufacturing labs and workshops. A central library, computer center with Wi-Fi, separate boys and girls hostels, sports facilities, gym only after the first sem, medical center, and basic campus amenities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Marwari College, RanchiReviewed on 21 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Average academics and placements, good for the degree, but requires more practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for the B.Com department are average. Classrooms are decent and a few have a smart-class setup. Wi-Fi is available on campus but the connectivity is not always reliable. There is no dedicated lab for the commerce department but the library is large and well-equipped with a good collection of books. Regarding hostel facilities, the rooms are basic and maintenance is a bit slow. The mess food is average. Sometimes good but the variety is limited.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by CIT Ranchi - Cambridge Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Placements in the college are increasing day by day.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college for the Computer Science and Engineering department is good. Wi-Fi is available on campus, labs are air-conditioned with Wi-Fi support, and classrooms. The library have fans and Wi-Fi. The food quality in the hostel mess is good. The canteen food is also decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by St. Xavier's CollegeReviewed on 27 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: The department offers smart classrooms, computer labs with Wi-Fi, a rich library, and seminar halls. Hostels are clean with 24/7 water and Wi-Fi. Mess serves hygienic food, and medical aid is available. The campus has good sports, a gym, and recreation facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Ram Lakhan Singh Yadav College, Ranchi UniversityReviewed on 21 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the campus life as well as the late semester.
reviews.review_text: Only one floor is available for students. It has the worst infrastructure I have ever seen. There is a library, but no reading room is available on the college campus. There is no mess or canteen. Few sports equipment are available for very few sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. Xavier's CollegeReviewed on 2 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: St Xavier's Ranchi B.Com accounts - Placement, fee, events, and many more.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained. Labs are amazing. Library is furnished and a good place to study. Many books are also available. Classrooms are very big and spacious. We have smart boards and appealing interior. We have three canteens. All of them provide good food.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by St. Xavier's CollegeReviewed on 25 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good for a head start in the higher education journey.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the department include a big, spacious classroom and a computer lab. The college also provides Wi-Fi connections and a library where we can study. There is also a department library from where we can issue books whenever we need them. Teachers help us understand which books are required for the syllabus and semester. I cannot say much about the hostel facilities as they are only provided for boys.

highlights.summary:
The MAH MBA CET 2026 registration period is now over for Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University admission to the MBA/MMS courses. The session 1 exam will be conducted tentatively from Apr 6 to Apr 8, 2026, and the session 2 exam will be held on May 9, 2026(Tentative).

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University was founded in 2004. It is a public university and is located in Solapur, Maharashtra. Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University courses are offered to students at the UG, PG and Certificate levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University offers a total of 171 courses in streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., MCA and B.Arch and the total seat intake for the available courses is 1581. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Acting, Agriculture, Apache Hadoop, Apparel Design and Automation. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 500 to 88,000 and the average median salary is around . Apart from this, the Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch and UG Diploma. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University courses are offered to students in Full Time and Part Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University courses stands around INR 500 to 88,000.

Q. How many courses do Solapur University offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of the SVERI Institute.

review_content.Placements: 50 percent of students were placed, and 50 percent of students took admission for post-graduation through the GPAT NIPER examination. The starting package is about Rs. 3,00,000 - 4,00,000. Companies like TCS and TCMS provided placements. Activities related to placements, such as aptitude tests and mock interviews, were conducted weekly.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college and institute is very good, as it has large classrooms, a laboratory for doing practicals, a seminar hall, a sports hall, a conference hall, an open amphitheater, etc. The library is also available for study, and it includes all books related to competitive exams, course books, and other personal development books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Best college of pharmacy in Solapur.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average. From my batch, around 7-8 are placed in various companies. Companies like TCMS, TCS, Omega Healthcare, etc, visit our college for placements. Also, in 3rd year of the Bachelor's program, a one-year internship programme is compulsory, to gain outside knowledge for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very bad. The rules and regulations of the hostel are too strict. They don't allow you to go outside for anything. They check your phones. There is no meaning of privacy in a hostel. In a small room, there are 7 girls. Common washrooms and toilets are very hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Very good choice if you want to get a bachelor's degree with low fees and other expenses.

review_content.Placements: Less than 50% of students get placed in my course, B.A. The highest package is around 5 LPA, the average is around 2.5 LPA, and the lowest is 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS and other local and education-related companies. Around 30% of students get internships in college and other local education-related companies. The top roles are teacher and education counselor.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are facilities like a library, labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, bathrooms, and study areas. Hostel facilities include good and healthy food, a canteen, a first aid kit, a sports ground, good and clean rooms for students, and clean toilets. The quality of the food is the best and felt like you are eating what your mom makes for you.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is nice, and facilities are also nice. I recommend this college.

review_content.Placements: Here, 30 students were placed out of 40. Placement is average. Highest package is 12 LPA, and lowest package is 4 LPA. Here, some communication companies, such as Wipro, are listed. Students are given proper training of interviews. More students are placed by placement cell, which is nice.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two hostels, one for first year and another for second year, third year, and final year. First-year hostel has common toilets, and other hostel has an attached bathroom. All things are properly worked. They have a separate girls' hostel and hot water 24 hours a day for batch.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and good placements. Good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: My college is very good. About 95% of students got placed. The highest package is 40 LPA. Many top companies prefer to take interviews and select students in my college. I am honestly proud to be a part of this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: SVERI College of Engineering has a very nice and clean hostel. The infrastructure of the college is very good and nice. Many computer labs are available in college. The Wi-Fi connection is clear and no issues with that. The big library is available in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Course is good, placements are bad, infrastructure is fine, faculty is great, facilities are great.

review_content.Placements: 10% of students get placed in my course. It's a difficult course so most avoid it. The highest and the lowest is same 5 LPA basis. Recruiting company is TCS. Placements are done outside at least when I completed it. Now with NEP they are promising 100% placements, we will have to see when that happens. Roles that are offered at TCS where technical support is not required. Major could go up from there if you have skills besides the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is developing, and they are building hostels for male and female students. For B.Sc. students, labs are available. Chemistry, physics, and bio have large halls for labs. Mathematics has a single room as lab which 3rd year students use as a class. Library has a lot of books, it has thousands of books in physical form. It has e-library which constitutes majority. College hostel is usually full but in next year or so new hostels will be open. College doesn't have mess of its own but will give you contacts for mess which will deliver food to your room.

hostel_campus.college_name: Punyashlok Ahilyadevi Holkar Solapur University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of PharmacyReviewed on 23 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of the SVERI Institute.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure of the college and institute is very good, as it has large classrooms, a laboratory for doing practicals, a seminar hall, a sports hall, a conference hall, an open amphitheater, etc. The library is also available for study, and it includes all books related to competitive exams, course books, and other personal development books.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of PharmacyReviewed on 20 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best college of pharmacy in Solapur.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very bad. The rules and regulations of the hostel are too strict. They don't allow you to go outside for anything. They check your phones. There is no meaning of privacy in a hostel. In a small room, there are 7 girls. Common washrooms and toilets are very hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Shriiman Bhaushaeb Zadbuke MahavidyalayaReviewed on 26 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good choice if you want to get a bachelor's degree with low fees and other expenses.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like a library, labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, bathrooms, and study areas. Hostel facilities include good and healthy food, a canteen, a first aid kit, a sports ground, good and clean rooms for students, and clean toilets. The quality of the food is the best and felt like you are eating what your mom makes for you.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 26 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is nice, and facilities are also nice. I recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: There are two hostels, one for first year and another for second year, third year, and final year. First-year hostel has common toilets, and other hostel has an attached bathroom. All things are properly worked. They have a separate girls' hostel and hot water 24 hours a day for batch.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 11 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placements. Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: SVERI College of Engineering has a very nice and clean hostel. The infrastructure of the college is very good and nice. Many computer labs are available in college. The Wi-Fi connection is clear and no issues with that. The big library is available in my college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Walchand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 5 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Course is good, placements are bad, infrastructure is fine, faculty is great, facilities are great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is developing, and they are building hostels for male and female students. For B.Sc. students, labs are available. Chemistry, physics, and bio have large halls for labs. Mathematics has a single room as lab which 3rd year students use as a class. Library has a lot of books, it has thousands of books in physical form. It has e-library which constitutes majority. College hostel is usually full but in next year or so new hostels will be open. College doesn't have mess of its own but ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by D.B.F. Dayanand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 21 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a really good college. Placements are good but you should definitely take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facility. Computer labs are also available. There is a library at the college. All these things are very beneficial. Good things are taught in our college. We really enjoy the event. Classrooms are very big and we enjoy it a lot.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Walchand College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 6 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It's a very simple unique and peaceful college where you'd find what's exactly needed.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has decent rooms and comparatively good quality food at the mess, in times and out times are fixed and efficient. There are shops and required things around the hostel itself and the area around it is also suitable for a student studying whatever degree.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 13 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The course facilities are good. The college campus is large, beautiful, and well-maintained. The hostel is also great for staying. Bus service is also good college classes are very big.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by V. G. Shivdare College of Arts, Commerce And ScienceReviewed on 2 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and the facilities they provide are not good.
reviews.review_text: The college has no fascinating infrastructure. Wi-Fi is not probably accessible to students. There are roughly few smart classrooms in the college. There is no hostel facility. The labs in the college are also not enough standardized for this course.

reviews.review_heading: A good institution to pursue a master's.
reviews.review_text: Pretty good facilities are available in the department like advanced laboratories, a well-managed digitalized library, and digitalized classrooms. There is a good hostel with different facilities like Wi-Fi and a gymnasium. There is no mess in the university hostel. We have a big ground for different sports activities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 25 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members and education system.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms such facilities and fresh environment infrastructure are available for our course or department. Facilities in our hostel are also very hygienic. Medical facilities are available for hostel students immediately. Our college achieved many national and international levels of prizes in sports and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Brahmdevdada Mane Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 16 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: If you are a mechanical engineering student then this college for you.
reviews.review_text: The labs were in good condition and well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available for office use. Hostels were available for both boys and girls but the food quality at the mess was not so good. The canteen was not so good either. But the best thing was the library which was big enough.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 14 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Really good discipline in college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure: Wi-Fi of 1Gbps, labs, classrooms, library, study room, medical facilities, all in one general store, canteen. For medical facilities, a doctor is near the hostel itself, and the quality of mess food is sometimes okay, sometimes not okay, but in the canteen, food is awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SVERI's College of Engineering, PandharpurReviewed on 6 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: SVERI's College of Engineering, Pandharpur review.
reviews.review_text: The college and the hostel are good. Both have excellent infrastructure and provide free Wi-Fi. The college has two buildings, and the hostel has three buildings for girls and three for boys. The boys' and girls' hostels are located some distance apart.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, Delhi Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

college_info.intro: The flagship programmes offered at IIGJ Delhi are Diploma in Jewellery Design and Diploma in Jewellery Manufacturing. Apart from this, the college also offers diploma courses across Gemmology and Manufacturing streams. Some of the popular programmes offered at Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery Delhi are as follows:

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Jewellery Design - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It has a good infrastructure and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Everyone in our course got placements. Tanishq is the top recruiting company for our course. Everyone got an internship from our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and the building is well maintained. All the facilities, like a library, Wi-Fi, and electricity, are available. There is no hostel or mess. Medical facilities are provided as well. There are no facilities for sports and games.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are so helpful, knowledgeable, and well qualified. The teaching quality is amazing. We are satisfied with the teaching quality. The course curriculum is relevant and makes students ready for the industry. Exams are not that difficult. The passing percentage is 50%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Jewellery Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am surely satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements provided here.

review_content.Placements: There were very few students in our batch like about 12-15 students. We got amazing faculty members and guidance. The main thing is we got to learn a new course, i.e., CAD-RHINO. IIGJ, Delhi provides what is in demand in the market. Many students got internships from our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our department, everything is very good like an internet facility and all the systems. Our department is very neat and clean everywhere, and proper precautions like sanitation, etc., are followed here. But there's no canteen, sports and games facilities.

admission_process.title: IIGJ Delhi Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, Delhi admissionto all courses is based on the merit secured by the candidates in the qualifying exam. The institute offers Diploma and Certificate courses in various specialisations such as Gemmology, CAD, Jewellery Design and Manufacturing etc. Candidates who have passed their class 12 are eligible for admission atIIGJ, Delhi.

Candidates seeking admission to IIGJ Delhi are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria before applying to their desired course. The minimum education required to apply forIIGJ courseadmission along with the selection criteria is mentioned below:

IIGJ Delhi admission process for all courses is ongoing. Interested candidates are required to visit the college campus and apply for their desired course to begin the admission process. Below is the step-wise admission process for IIGJ Delhi:
Candidates can apply offline at IIGJ. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for a course. To fill out the form offline, candidates are required to visit the campus.
Once the registration is done, IIGJ Delhi selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The minimum merit for both UG Diploma and Certificate courses is Class 12.
After the selection is done, shortlisted candidates will get a confirmation letter. They are further required to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good infrastructure and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the building is well maintained. All the facilities, like a library, Wi-Fi, and electricity, are available. There is no hostel or mess. Medical facilities are provided as well. There are no facilities for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am surely satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements provided here.
reviews.review_text: In our department, everything is very good like an internet facility and all the systems. Our department is very neat and clean everywhere, and proper precautions like sanitation, etc., are followed here. But there's no canteen, sports and games facilities.

college_info.intro:
JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai offers several UG, PG, diploma, and certification courses to students. The courses are offered in the fields of Fashion Design and Interior Design.
The BSc programme offered at the institute is highly popular among the students. JDIFT offers the BSc programme in the following two specialisations:
The BSc programme is offered for a duration of three years. The BSc graduates from JDIFT Mumbai can work as Fashion Illustrators, Textile Designers, Personal Stylists, Town Planning Bureaus, Exhibition Designers, etc. Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at the JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai, along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fees, in the table provided below:
For more information about the JD Institute of Fashion Technology check out the below video:

faqs.question: Does JD institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai conducts entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    JD Institute of Fashion Technolgy Mumbai admission is based on performance of the candidates in the entrance exam for BSc and MSc courses. The institute conducts GAT to shortlist candidates for admission. All prospective candidates must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to appear for the entrance- exam.The General Aptitude Test (GAT) is conducted in two rounds. In the first round, candidates have to appear for a situation test. Applicants who perform well in the situation test will be shortlisted for the second round which is the personal interview round. Based on the performance of the candidates in both rounds, the candidates will be given the final admission offer.

admission_overview.college_name: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai Admission process 2025

paragraphs: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai admissionsare merit and entrance-based. The institute conducts GAT or General Aptitude Test to select candidates for admission to degree courses.JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbaioffers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels in the Design stream. The institute offers BSc and MSc in affiliation withSun Rise University. Candidates can apply for the preferred course on the official website of JDIFT.

JDIFT offers courses in full-time mode. Candidates seeking admission to JDIFT Mumbai must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria. Below areJD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

JDIFT Mumbai admissionis merit-based and all the prospective candidates are required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for selection. Admissions are currently open for JDIFT. Interested candidates can check out the step-wiseJDIFT admission processbelow:

Candidates must first apply for the course of their choice. Aspirants can apply online on the official website of JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai. Candidates need to pay an application fee of INR 5,000 to register for the course.

The institute evaluates the applications of the candidates and selects them based on their merit. Aspirants also need to appear for the General Aptitude Test for admission to UG and PG courses. The test assesses candidates' existing creative abilities. Candidates can also contact the academic counsellor for any query.
Once the selection is completed, candidates are informed about their admission. Selected aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 or equivalent with at least 45% aggregate to apply for JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai BSc course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, aspirants must also qualify General Aptitude Test or GAT conducted by the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BSc at JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai?
faqs.answer: JD Institute of Fashion Technology Mumbai offers admission to BSc course based on GAT score and merit in the last qualifying exam. GAT is General Aptitude Test conducted by the institute in online mode. GAT is comprises of two rounds including situation test and interview. Admission to BSc courses is based on aptitude, artistic sense and career focus of the candidate.

college_info.college_name: Times and Trends Academy, Chinchwad

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Times and Trends Academy, Chinchwad Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has excellent management, teaching faculty members and good exposure to current design trends.

review_content.Placements: The internship program starts after you finish your 1st year of the course. Our institute has tie-ups with many firms for recruitment. Most of the students are well-placed when they complete their course. Students get good exposure to real-time projects, and they are ready to take up new projects as they are out of college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, and all study materials are available as per students' requirements. The library facility with a variety of study references is available in the institute, which helps students to gain extra knowledge. Spacious classrooms and also facilities are available for digital learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Event Management - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest you just be positive and join this academy. You will find your own ways to grow.

review_content.Placements: Placements totally depend on how much effort you make to gain knowledge of your field and how many contacts you make as well. In the end, every student gets jobs, but it depends on you that how much money you earn. The main thing in the event management industry is how you utilise your talent.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice here. Everything is provided which we need to have in any academy. Classrooms are neat and clean, and they take proper care of maintaining hygiene. Extra activities are conducted on every occasion. Even there is a kitchen for some purposes, which are rarely needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Interior Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It has very good and friendly faculty, and good placements in 2018, and I miss my college days.

review_content.Placements: I got placed in Zolostays Property Solutions as a design consultant intern, and by reviewing my performance, I got placed as a permanent employee there, with a starting package of 2.25 LPA. It was a campus placement, and it was my 1st interview to start my career.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms are available. Software training and practice labs are available. The staff are always available to help us. They are friendly too.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and friendly. They were ready to help us whenever we ask and provided real-life guidance. The course included live examples and market study for upcoming trends and material. Site surveys are conducted for us to gain onsite knowledge. They encourage us by organising different exhibitions, where we can showcase our creativity.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in VFX - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: TTA Chinchwad helps me alot to grow up with my career.

review_content.Placements: From our batch, 6 people out of 10 are got selected off-campus. I got selected as a Creative Production Manager at Duty Corp at the package of Rs 3.5 lakh/ year. I don't know about the current student's placement because of covid, I came back to my home town and currently, I started my own production company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and high tech classrooms. Cooperative teachers with experience. Extra classes are available for personality development and self-growth. Industrial visits and guest faculty are there for industrial training.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Communication Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: NID Haryana is the second-best NID after Ahmedabad.

review_content.Placements: 99% of students get placed in either through campus placements or self. The highest package offered last time in the textile department was 75 LPA. The average package is 12 LPA. A lot of companies approach including Daily Objects, Adobe, Microsoft, etc. A lot of students got internships during graduation projects. Creative director or creative head are the top roles offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a well-maintained hostel with decent means. Wi-Fi is good but can be better. It has decent studios and a library. It has very good facilities like AC, TV, and digital library. We have our own ambulance in case of emergency and a doctor is present on the campus. Mess is open till 1 am.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Des. in Industrial Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good in everything, literally the best of NIDs. Majority of students are satisfied.

review_content.Placements: Since I am in the first year, I don't have a proper idea about the placements. But one thing I am sure is that our placement cell is providing placements to many companies all over India, as per the college's brochure. I have personally heard from some seniors that they also got many internship offers, thanks to the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really great and beautiful. Unlike other NIDs, this college's aesthetics is more like IIT. And talking about facilities, we have pretty much all the basic facilities both in college and hostel. The college has great high-end facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, good and secure Wi-Fi, labs with high-end computers and devices, and the workshop is also having everything we needed, such as metal workshop, wood, clay, laser cutting, and 3D printing workshops. And about hostels, we have high-end Wi-Fi, spacious rooms, and automatic washing machines. The mess food is the greatest food you will ever find in any college. Totally worth it.

admission_overview.college_name: NID Haryana Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: NID Haryana Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: NID Haryana or NIT Kurukshetra admissionsare entrance-based. The institute offers admission to BDes programme via Design Aptitude Test (DAT) scores, which includes Prelims and Mains. The course is available in three specialisations and the admission process is common for all programmes. Candidates can apply on the official portal of NID for admission toNID Haryana. The admission process for NID through DAT has been started for the year 2025. Candidates can check out the following video for information regarding theNID admission process:
More details aroundNID Haryana admissions 2025are as follows:

Candidates seeking for admission to NID Haryana must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements before filling out the admission form. The institute conducts a national-level entrance exam for admission to UG programme. Check below theNID Haryana coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

NID Kuruskhetra fees include multiple components such as tuition fee, hostel charges, one-time security deposit and more. Moreover, NIT Haryana has three specialisations under BDes programme. The seat intake for each of them is 25. Tabulated below are the NID Haryana BDes total tuition fee and seat intake:

NID Haryana admission process is consists of mutiple rounds. It includes filling online application form, qualifying entrance exam and final seat allotment after the result declaration. The detailed steps of admission for NID Kurkshetra are as follows:

To apply for admission at NID Haryana, candidates need to apply on the official website of NID. The design institute applications are conudcted in online mode. The application form must be filled carefully with all the relevant details. Along with that, candidates must also pay an application fee.

NIT Kurukshetra admissions are completely entrance-based for BDes programme. To get admission, candidates need to qualify for NIT DAT entrance exam. It is a national-level examination, which is conducted across 22 cities in India. Candidates should solveNIT DAT question papersto practice before the exam.

After the completion of the entrance exam, the conducting body releases the final result. Later on, a cutoff list is released by the institute mentioning the qualfying score for admission to BDes course at NID Haryana.
STEP 4: Release of Provisional Offer Letter
Candidates who make through the selection process and qualify and meet the cutoff marks are then issued provisional offer letters.
STEP 5: Final Seat Allotment & Fee Payment
Further, the institute conducts seat allotment rounds for selected students. Moreover, candidates must pay the course fee and report to the respective campus for physical verification of documents.
Check out more on National Institute of Design, Haryana in the video below:

The college has great high-end facilities like air-conditioned classrooms, good and secure Wi-Fi, labs with high-end computers and devices, and the workshop is also having everything we needed, such as metal workshop, wood, clay, laser cutting, and 3D printing workshops. And about ho...

paragraphs: The application fee of NID DAT 2026 for the B. Des for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates is INR 3,000. SC, ST, PwD candidates only ned to pay INR 1,500. However note that the application fees for overseas candidates seeking admission to supernumerary seats is INR 5000. In case of the M.Des programme, the application fees for General, General-EWS, OBC-NCL candidates applying for one discipline is INR 3,000. If two disciplines are chosen, the application fee is INR 6000. Meanwhile, SC, ST, PwD candidate need to pay INR 1,500 for one discipline, and INR 3000 for two disciplines.
The NID DAT 2026 application form is now open.

review_content.Placements: Only 10-15 % students were offered placement. Faculty members make zero efforts in helping students for the same. And students find their own internship. Since college force students to come college and maintain 75% attendance students don't really get enough time to work on their skills and find internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: UPID don't have their own hostel students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. The faculty members don't really teach anything they just give the assignments. And for theories they ask students to make PPT on those topics and explain them. Bad food quality limited menu. No canteen, no sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active they just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

review_summary.college_name: U.P. Institute of Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average infrastructure but great hands-on experience.

content.Placements: The placement cell is weak people don't get placed by the college itself 10 percent of the students get recruited from the university, and 13 LPA is the highest package offered by the company but it was outside the college. There are not as many companies only companies like Drute, and TVS come for the MBA recruitment B.Des recruitment cell is not great. The top roles are ui ux designer, and assistant designer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi only comes in a very small range and the labs, classrooms, and library are okay the classrooms have AC which is fully in working condition, the class also has lockers, and the classrooms get locked after 5 pm which is great too, the library has all the necessary books and its easy to get them issue. There is no hostel, the canteen has home-cooked food, there's a first aid kit, as for sports and games there's is a badminton court.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Design (B.Des.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the entire college.

content.Placements: Only 10-15% of students are offered placements. Faculty members make zero efforts in helping students the same. Students find their own internships. Since college force students to come to college and maintain 75% attendance. Students don't really get enough time to work on their skills and find internship.
content.Infrastructure: UPID doesn't have its own hostel. Students have to manage on their own. Locality is the worst. Bad food quality and a limited menu. No canteen for faculty members. No sports and no games. It's like this college don't want students to be physically fit and active. They just want students to complete the assignments and maintain 75% attendance.

admission_process.title: IIGJ Mumbai Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Gems & Jewellery Mumbai admission 2025is open. The institute accepts students on a merit basis. Also known asIIGJ Mumbai, the institute provides several courses at undergraduate and diploma levels in the field of Gems and Jewellery Design. The institute offers its BA course in affiliation withSavitribai Phule Pune University (SP PU. Students can read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information for theIIGJ Mumbai campus.

Indian Institute of Gems & Jewellery admissionsare merit-based. To get into the courses offered at the institute, students need to qualify for the preset admission criteria. Candidates are required to complete a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG courses. Students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forIIGJ Mumbai courses:

Students seeking to get into IIGJ Mumbai need to go through a multi-step admission process that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. The admission process of the institute is held both in online and offline modes. Find below the step-wiseIndian Insttiute of Gems and Jewellry Mumbai admission process:

Candidates can apply either online or offline depending on their preference at IIGJ. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying for a course. To fill out the form offline, candidates are required to visit the campus. Students need to submit the duly filled-in form along with the required documents to the admission office of the institute.

Once the registration is done, IIGJ Mumbai selects candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The minimum merit for BA is Class 12 whereas, graduation is the minimum requirement for the PG Diploma programme. The institute also conducts a PI round to shortlist the candidates.
After the selection is done, shortlisted candidates will get a confirmation letter. They are further required to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: Which courses does Government Home Science College, Chandigarh offer?

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. Although the course is very valuable, yet many last year students remained without a job. It all depends on the hard work and intelligence of students. More than the college, placements are dependent on the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, huge and well-ventilated. Food quality in the mess and the canteen is very commendable, and medical facilities are 24x7 available for any emergency case. Sports and games and any outdoor activities are not much encouraged.

reviews_list.batch_info: P.G. Diploma in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with everything except for the fact that there are no placements.

review_content.Placements: Our college did not offer any placements to the students. Only internships were given to the students in different hospitals. I was placed in GMCH - 32 for three months for training under professional dietician. Others were placed in PGI and some were placed in GMSH -16.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has an old building. It is a standard red brick government building. All facilities are available. The college library is pretty impressive. It has two floors and it is very well maintained. There's even a hostel and a well maintained canteen in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Home Science (Foods and Nutrition) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is average college, and personality development subjects can be part of curriculum for students.

review_content.Placements: Enrolment for Placements is not done yet, but a number of students get placed to various companies. The average salary offered varies from 1 LPA - 2 LPA. . After M.Sc., students are sent for 45 days internship in the hospital with a letter of recommendation. Top roles offered in our specialisation is of a dietitian in the hospital, and one can also work in MNC, NGO, Anganwadi and many more. One can also work as a food scientist and home scientist.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with good labs provided to students. Smart class facility is also available in some classrooms. There is a huge collection of books available for the undergraduate and post-graduate students from every field in the home science. Research papers and editorial sections are available for the M.Sc. . students to carry out their research. Wi-Fi facility is not provided in the college campus and hostel except the computer room. There are two hostels, one for B.Sc. Students and others for M.Sc students who are 83 in number. The hostel has an average infrastructure. But students are provided with food good in taste in the mess. No medical facilities are provided in the hostel. Canteen food is good and affordable. The college has NSS and NCC as well as sports team for competitionS.

review_summary.college_name: Government Home Science College, Chandigarh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Apparel and Textile Design) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Home Science College, Chandigarh.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. Every year, multiple placement drives are held, and 10-20 companies visit for campus drives. The minimum salary package offered is up to 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-maintained and well-built. It has very beautiful and new building and gardens. It has a botanical garden full of plants and the whole campus is greenery. Hostel, library, mess, canteen, botanical garden, and Chaitanya School are some of the main attractions on the campus which make the campus very beautiful. The food is really tasty compared to other hostels and PGs. However, I don't recommend the hostel as buildings are very old and can collapse at any time.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Dietetics) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is value for money.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are average. Although the course is very valuable, yet many last year students remained without a job. It all depends on the hard work and intelligence of students. More than the college, placements are dependent on the students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, huge and well-ventilated. Food quality in the mess and the canteen is very commendable, and medical facilities are 24x7 available for any emergency case. Sports and games and any outdoor activities are not much encouraged.

individual_reviews.course: P.G. Diploma in Nutrition and Dietetics - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with everything except for the fact that there are no placements.

content.Placements: Our college did not offer any placements to the students. Only internships were given to the students in different hospitals. I was placed in GMCH - 32 for three months for training under professional dietician. Others were placed in PGI and some were placed in GMSH -16.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an old building. It is a standard red brick government building. All facilities are available. The college library is pretty impressive. It has two floors and it is very well maintained. There's even a hostel and a well maintained canteen in the college.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Home Science (Foods and Nutrition) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is average college, and personality development subjects can be part of curriculum for students.

content.Placements: Enrolment for Placements is not done yet, but a number of students get placed to various companies. The average salary offered varies from 1 LPA - 2 LPA. . After M.Sc., students are sent for 45 days internship in the hospital with a letter of recommendation. Top roles offered in our specialisation is of a dietitian in the hospital, and one can also work in MNC, NGO, Anganwadi and many more. One can also work as a food scientist and home scientist.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good with good labs provided to students. Smart class facility is also available in some classrooms. There is a huge collection of books available for the undergraduate and post-graduate students from every field in the home science. Research papers and editorial sections are available for the M.Sc. . students to carry out their research. Wi-Fi facility is not provided in the college campus and hostel except the computer room. There are two hostels, one for B.Sc. Students and others for M.Sc students who are 83 in number. The hostel has an average infrastructure. But students are provided with food good in taste in the mess. No medical facilities are provided in the hostel. Canteen food is good and affordable. The college has NSS and NCC as well as sports team for competitionS.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Home Science (Dietetics) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with limited knowledge. Good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 1. No placements for graduates. Only for post graduate students. The salary offered would be around 25,000 per month. Max hospital Mohali was the top recruiter, For master students and PG Diploma students. Assistant dietitian, helper in the clinic were the roles offered to them. 10% of master students got an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-fi was available. Smart and spacious classrooms were available. Library having all types of books related to every course were available. All type of facilities were available in hostel, the food and mess requirements were matched for every student. There was no game facility in the campus. But medical facility was available.

faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1: Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2: Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.Step 3: You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology, formerly Mody University, is a private women's university located in Lakshmangarh in the state of Rajasthan, India. It was established in 1998. admission_overview.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: Mody University of Science and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology admission is open.The university offers courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exams accepted by the university, such as JEE Main, GATE, NATA, NEET, CAT, XAT, NMAT, CMAT and others.Mody University of Science and Technologyalso conducts university-based entrance exams and interviews for both UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to some UG and PG courses university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any course can apply on the official website of the university. To know more about Mody University of Science and Technology admission, course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process, go through the following sections:

Mody University of Science and Technology admission is primarily entrance-based. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. The university offers different programmes under various schools, such as School of Business, School of Design, School of Engineering, and others, at UG, PG, and doctoral levels. The courses includeBA, MA,MSc, BTech,MBA, PhD, and others. Candidates looking for admission to Mody University of Science and Technology must have a bachelor's degree for admission to PG courses and have passed Class 12 for admission to UG courses. Additionally, applicants are required to appear for the entrance exam accepted by the university for their desired course. Given below are the eligibility and selection criteria for Mody University of Science and Technology courses:

Pass Class 10 and Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the subjects Chemistry/Computer science/ Bio-Technology/Biology and adequate proficiency in English
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream with proficiency in English from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 or its equivalent in any stream in proficiency in English with 45% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics with 50% aggregate
10+3 with subjects of Mathematics with 50% aggregate
Graduation degree in any discipline with 50% aggregate
CAT/ XAT/NMAT/ CMAT/MAT/ ATMA/GMAT/ Mody University Entrance Test +PI
Check here for detailed eligibility criteria for moreMody University of Science and Technology courses
Download:Mody University of Science and Technology Broucher

Mody University of Science and Technology admission process 2025 includes various steps that must be completed by all candidates to get admission into the university. The process starts with the submission of an application form, followed by a course-specific entrance exam, and other selection rounds if applicable. After the selection rounds, course-wise merit lists are released on the official website of Mody University. Candidates who get shortlisted are required to submit the necessary fee to confirm their final seat. Find below theMody University of Science and Technology admission process:

Candidates looking for admission to Mody University must apply for admission by going to the official website of the university or visiting the university campus directly for offline application. The application process is conducted in online and offline modes.

Once the application window is closed, applicants are required to apply and appear for a course-specific entrance exam and other selection rounds as well. For some courses the university conducts and accepts, national-level exam scores for admission. Further, for some courses, the university offers admission based on the last qualifying exam score. Once all selection rounds are complete, Mody University of Science and Technology released course-wise merit lists on the official website.
Applicants who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to pay a certain amount ofMody University of Science and Technology feeto lock the final seat.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Mody University of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The courses offered by the School of Engineering and Technology and the School of Business are duly approved by AICTE. Mody University of Science and Technology offers various courses including UG, PG and PhD levels. Admission is entrance-based- based and eligibility will be merit-based. Find below the fees for various courses offered by Mody University of Science and Technology:CoursesTuition FeesBDesINR 8.3 lakhMDesINR 3 lakhBScINR 3.3 lakh - INR 4.4 lakhBTechINR 6.1 lakh - INR 11.3 lakhBA LLBINR 7.6 lakh - INR 9.8 lakhMScINR 1.3 lakh - INR 1.6 lakhBBAINR 4.5 lakh - INR 9 lakhMBAINR 5.8 lakh - INR 9 lakh

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Mody University of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology offers entrance-based admission to some of its UG, PG and PhD courses, such as BTech, BArch, MBA, BA LLB and others. Further, for some courses like BA, BCA, Bcom, MCom, and others university offers merit-based admission. Candidates looking for admission to any of these courses must appear for various entrance exams which includes CAT/XAT/NMAT/CMAT/MAT/ATMA/GMAT/JEE Main/ Mody University Entrance Test and other. Further, for direct admission, candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for UG courses and pass graduation degree for PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Mody University?
faqs.answer: Mody University of Science and Technology provides a unique opportunity for female students all over the world to pursue undergraduate and postgraduate programs through MUSAT (Mody University Scholarship cum Admission Test). The admission process involves three simple steps:Step 1:Fill and submit the application form online.Step 2:Download the PDF of the application form from the website, fill it in, and send it along with a Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favour of "Mody University of Science and Technology", payable at Lakshmangarh or Sikar. Mail it to the Central Admissions Office.Step 3:You can obtain the prospectus and application form in person from the Mody University of Science and Technology, Lakshmangarh office, upon payment of INR 1000 in cash.

faqs.question: When was CAT 2025 exam conducted?
faqs.answer: The CAT exam is always conducted in November every year so CAT 2026 will be conducted in November next year. Students can clickhereto know more about the CAT examination.

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is Mody University. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the India Today 2025, the institute ranked #133 under Engineering (Private) category, and #163 under Engineering. Mody University excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around Mody University rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 9th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Rajasthan In 2025

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, Mody University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Mody University fell 300 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Mody University fell 105 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The campus has 28 hostels, all of which are air-conditioned except for 3 hostels. Each hostel houses 180 students and each student can choose between single, double or four-bed facilities with an option of AC or non AC rooms. Each room comes with ample storage capacity and are well furnished and well-ventilated. All hostel floors have been equipped with water coolers with the latest RO technology and students can also enjoy 24×7 Wi-Fi connectivity.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball, Hockey, Horse Riding

cafeteria.description:
Students and faculty members can enjoy a world-cuisine cafeteria that serves four kinds of global
cuisines, such as - Italian, Mexican, Chinese and Indian.

facilities: Fluid Mechanics and Fluid Machineries Laboratory
labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Language Lab, Physics Lab, Artificial Intelligence (AI) Laboratory, Operating System (OS) Laboratory, IBM Software Centre of Excellence (CoE), Graphics and Multimedia Laboratory, Networking Laboratory, Visual Studio Dot Net Laboratory, Advanced Java Laboratory, Database Laboratory, Mobile & Grid Computing Laboratory, General Purpose Programming Language Laboratory, Communication Laboratory, Analog Laboratory, Microprocessor & Microcontroller Laboratory, Microwave & Antenna Laboratory, Digital Electronics Laboratory, Industrial Electronics Laboratory, Electrical Machines Laboratory, Network Analysis Laboratory, Electrical and Electronics Measurement Laboratory, Power Electronics Laboratory, Control System Laboratory, Strength of Materials Laboratory, Fluid Mechanics and Fluid Machineries Laboratory, Thermodynamics Laboratory, Production Engineering/CAM Laboratory, Measurement & Control Laboratory, CAD Laboratory, Nanosimulation Laboratory, Nanomaterials Characterization Laboratory, Physics Research Laboratory, Chemistry Research Laboratory, Water Technology Laboratory

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with faculty members and placements in 2025 but infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite great of this college with great library, labs, and classrooms. But hostels are not quite safe nowadays and a lot of illegal things are been done there. The food quality of food is average, no such good medical facilities are available there.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with a really fascinating campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Mody University is very fabulous. It has a Wi-Fi connection overall in the building. There are well-facilitated labs and it is very big. There is a huge library and classrooms are also very clean and digitalised. Hostels are very hygienic. The food is also very nice. Mody gives a nice platform for a sports person, it also keeps track offer physical health.

reviews.review_heading: Campus of college is very aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice from mess to different labs everything is available as per requirement. Library also has all books for different courses. Hostels are also well managed and get cleaned every day. Rooms are also spacious. University campus includes many grounds for all sports both indoor and outdoor.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is very good and aesthetic.
reviews.review_text: Food quality is good but it's not worth the fees they receive. Hostel room quality is very good. Food is also sometimes good and sometimes not good but we get sweets for dinner every day which is the best part. Food according to festivals is also served.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend Mody University as it has the best campus and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Mody University has Wi-Fi available for all, very well-facilitated labs, smart classrooms, and a huge library. The hostel is quite nice, and the food is very healthy as everything is done inside the campus. The hostels are very well cleaned, and it has 200+ faculty members and 7 different schools according to your field.

reviews.review_heading: Mody University: In Revel and in Real
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is just awesome, with labs, smart classrooms with air conditioning, and Wi-Fi. The hostel is also excellent, offering all facilities including mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports and games. Proper security is available, and transportation within the campus is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Make you career mood happy with mody University.
reviews.review_text: Overall, college infrastructure is good, but MBA buildings have weird infrastructure. You will find peacocks and temples in the campus area. The college annual festival, Unayaan, is celebrated on a large scale in November. Teachers provide study material; notes and books are available in the library. Colleges have Wi-Fi. You can search for any information by sitting in classrooms, but you are restricted to downloading movies from Wi-Fi. Classroom amenities are good; they provide comfortable chai...

reviews.review_heading: The placement rate is good and overall, other things are fine.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is amazing; bad air conditioning labs and a well-equipped library are the best. To be honest, if you live on campus, you are not allowed to leave or order food, and the mess food is terrible. Students are dissatisfied with the food quality.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities were provided at the university, such as Wi-Fi, library, labs, etc. The hostel too had all the basic necessities such as tables, mattresses, etc. The quality of food was pretty good, but the taste could be better. There is a clinic on campus, but it is not free. There are courts and grounds for almost all the commonly played sports. There is a horse-riding ground too, and a lot of students get involved in one or more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: All our Laboratories are filled with highly equipped instruments which are needed for practicals. A large number of faculty members and technicians work here. Around 60+ buses are running regularly from our college campus. All the medical facilities are available within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Get the best experience with Mody University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, having thousands of trees and herbs, birds, peacock and other beauties. Wi-Fi is available 24*7 and the classroom is comfortable with smart boards, air airconditioning and very comfortable sitting amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Top-notch Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university boasts top-notch infrastructure. The expansive and scenic surroundings feature trees, mountains, and various flowers, creating a pleasant environment. The library is spacious and well-stocked with books. Classrooms are large, and the labs are well-equipped with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A best college which provides good placement opportunity!
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilis one of the best facility in Mody University. You will find one of the best hostel facility in private colleges in Rajasthan. Here you will get rooms on double and triple sharing basis. Rooms are available in both AC and NON AC format. Food served in the mess is proper food with no onion and garlic in it.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, time, and a life time experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure plays an important role before choosing any college because it does help us shape us. This college have great infra with good facilities and greenery around. There are around more than 20 hostel building with emmense facilities there and a horse Riding ground, football, hockey, bollyball and many more sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mody University of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. There are well-established and well-maintained classrooms. Our labs are equipped with high-end IBM and Accenture systems. Our college infrastructure is excellent. The mess food is good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mody University of Science and Technology

likes.text: Companies like Accenture, Infosysy, IBM, John Deere, Mahindra and Mahindra, Oracle, Honeywell are top recruiters.
Students did their internship in companies like Outlook Magazine, HDFC Bank, Regal Shipping, etc.

likes.text: If we talk about facilities then right from WiFi to labs, from classrooms to library, from medical facilities to sports, all were the best.
Hostel rooms are really good and food is okay, further classroom and labs are fully equipped.

likes.text: They helped us with their best possible knowledge by providing notes, extra classes, tutorials, labs and assignments.
The course curriculum is excellent here, and faculty members are also good.

likes.text: My course is best because it is career-oriented about what I have to become and what I have to do in my life.
There are scholarships, different courses are offered too, mandatory courses by IIT Bombay, loads of Extracurricular activities, sports, clubs and societies, campus fests which are great fun.

college_info.college_name: Mody University of Science and Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Mody University of Science and Technology (MUST) is a popular private university in Lakshmangarh, Rajasthan. It has various programs for women students. The university has Grade-A+ certification by the NAAC and is recognised by UGC, BCI, and AICTE. MUST is a member of the AIU and the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business, and provides popular programs like BTech and BSc.

MUST Lakshamangarh is committed to providing quality higher education to deserving girl students, despite financial barriers. The university has several scholarship schemes for students, depending on both the merit and entrance-test basis. Also, students can benefit from diverse special scholarship programs. Read below to know more:
State first 3 ranks in HSC of
Students who qualify for both merit and special scholarships can receive the benefits of both the schemes.
Also, the beneficiary students must have no backlog, no disciplinary action, and have 75% attendance.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, Carmel College, Mala offers courses such as M.Sc., M.Com and M.A. Carmel College, Mala fee structure for all the courses is around INR 3,150 to 1,00,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Carmel College, Mala is a well-known institution for PGDCA, Certificate, M.Com, UG Diploma, BCA, B.A, B.Com, BBA, B.Sc, B.Voc, After 10th Diploma, M.Sc, M.A. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. reviews_list.review_title: Review of Carmel College, Mala.

review_content.Placements: Placements were very good. Top recruiting companies were Google, Amazon, Flipkart, and Netflix. All jobs were offered by top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities were very good. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories were better. There was a decent library in this college. Reading room was available. The food served in the canteen was good. Our college premises were plastic-free. Our campus was eco-friendly.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were friendly, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. All teachers were Ph.D. scholars. The course curriculum was relevant to make students ready for the industry. The pass percentage was good. It was an autonomous college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Functional English - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review for Carmel College, Mala.

review_content.Placements: I have graduated in B.A. functional English and most of the students has opted for higher studies. The placement is less for this subject in the college. Companies came mainly for B.Com graduate and graduate from any field can also sometimes able to join the interviews. Teachers will update us with internship opportunities and events which we can join.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many departments in the college I. e UG and PG many are self financing a new integrated programme for sociology has started last year. A big library is there. Free Wi-Fi. Don't know much about hostel, but situated near to college. There is a language lab but less usage.
