overview_faqs.question: Can Carmel College, Mala be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Carmel College, Mala is a distinguished institution offering PGDCA, Certificate, M.Com, UG Diploma, BCA, B.A, B.Com, BBA, B.Sc, B.Voc, After 10th Diploma, M.Sc, M.A. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Banking, Finance & Insurance, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Humanities & Social Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Science, Design, Mass Communication & Media field. Carmel College, Mala is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Carmel College, Mala has received an impressive review rating of 4.53 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 5 for Campus Life, 4.33 for Placements, 4.67 for Faculty, and 4.33 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Carmel College, Mala Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Sociology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Poor facilities are available.

content.Placements: More than 60 percent of students were placed, and a few students got internships in other sectors with the highest salary package of 9.4 lacks per annum and the lowest package of 2.3 lacks per annum. Top companies like Wipro, TCS, IBM, Deloitte, etc. visit our college. Top roles offered are Socialist, Researcher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, but better facilities are available like Wi-Fi, food, classrooms, departments, labs, etc. The mess and canteen are very hygienic, and a medical kit is available. Sports and games are conducted, and cultural events are included.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Sociology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: All the faculty members are highly qualified in their fields.

content.Placements: Students in their last semester can apply for placement but one condition is that only good scores are eligible to apply. Teachers select a student for placement who has excellent academic performance in whole years of courses. Recently about 13 Students with MBA grades have been placed by Bangalore-based companies. They provided 6 Lacs per annum of the highest packages. The Average package was 2.5 Lacs per annum. The Percentage of placements is not so good as only a few students got placements in the last years. I will complete my research in sociology.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Finance - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Carmel College, Mala.

content.Placements: Placements were very good. Top recruiting companies were Google, Amazon, Flipkart, and Netflix. All jobs were offered by top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were very good. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories were better. There was a decent library in this college. Reading room was available. The food served in the canteen was good. Our college premises were plastic-free. Our campus was eco-friendly.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were friendly, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. All teachers were Ph.D. scholars. The course curriculum was relevant to make students ready for the industry. The pass percentage was good. It was an autonomous college.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Functional English - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review for Carmel College, Mala.

content.Placements: I have graduated in B.A. functional English and most of the students has opted for higher studies. The placement is less for this subject in the college. Companies came mainly for B.Com graduate and graduate from any field can also sometimes able to join the interviews. Teachers will update us with internship opportunities and events which we can join.
content.Infrastructure: There are many departments in the college I. e UG and PG many are self financing a new integrated programme for sociology has started last year. A big library is there. Free Wi-Fi. Don't know much about hostel, but situated near to college. There is a language lab but less usage.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in History - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college atmosphere. Teachers considered us masters or like them.

content.Placements: The M.A. History course provides great opportunities today. Many of the students were placed in colleges as lecturers and assistant professors. Others were posted as teachers in schools. Many of them prepared for the UPSC. Colleges and teachers provide training and instruction to acquire knowledge in our subject and prepare us for clear exams like NET, SET, and UPSC. PSC etc.
content.Infrastructure: College campuses provide a good atmosphere. The classroom, departments, also infrastructure facilities are good. A perfect library is there. There are two hostels for UG students and PG students. The canteen provides good, tasty, and quality food. The majority of the students are part of extracurricular activities. Carmel College is famous for sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements, facilities, and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 100 to 130 students get placed. The average package is 3 LPA to 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Movate, Embedyour, Foxconn, Unlimited Innovation, Virtusa, Cognizant, and Accenture. About 60% of students got internships at companies like Infosys, ISRO, etc. Roles offered include Software Engineer, AI Intern, Data Analyst, Cloud, DevOps, and Data Science.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure. We have many classrooms and lab facilities. Everyone can access the Wi-Fi inside the college. The department is very good. The courses offered are really valuable. The food offered here is 8/10. Medical facilities are 10/10. Sports facilities are also 10/10.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Chose it for the atmosphere, stayed for the people.

review_content.Placements: Our placement process is still ongoing since it is only November, so the final numbers are not out yet. For now, around 20% of students get placed. More companies are still coming. The highest package for Marketing roles is about 7–8 LPA, while the average package ranges from 4–5 LPA. The minimum offers start around 3 LPA. Internships are compulsory for everyone because the internship viva is part of the semester examination, so almost 90% of students complete it on time. The main roles offered include Marketing, Finance, HR, Data Analytics, and Logistics.

overview_faqs.question: What is unique about B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: The main thing every students wishes before joining the college is Freedom. B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology is the perfect place where a student gets a freedom by which he can achieve greater heights,The term freedom means that you are not pressured to study but the staffs will help you to study on the go and get good marks.Crescent has a club named CIIC where a person can transform his/her idea into a real world entity.Apart from studies crescent campus has 3 canteens and 2 cafeterias which provide you with a good quality of food at a affordable price.Numerous events and workshops are conducted which enables a person to upskill himself/herself and find their talents.

review_summary.college_name: Crescent College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Top performers get recognized with the correct things.

content.Placements: Purely technological companies including Anthem Biosciences, Catalyst Clinical Research, Syneos Health, and Retro Biotech have been constantly showing their recruitment since the 2020 batches. Organizations like Regional Centre for Biotechnology and IISER offer internships to the top-performing candidates.
content.Infrastructure: A medical community is open on the campus at all times and works 24 hours, considering emergency situations as 3 to 4 hostels are located inside the campus. Every day, a free session is scheduled to discuss extracurricular activities to avoid creating unnecessary hindrance during class. Classrooms are fully air-facilitated with a number of doors and windows, comfortable desks for seating, and storage for books.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Construction Engineering & Project Management - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Crescent University review.

content.Placements: The placement in our course was average. The highest package offered in our course was 12 LPA. The average package was around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Reliance Construction, Larsen & Turbo, etc. Around 40 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. All the necessary labs were available with proper instruments; some may not work, but most of them are in working condition. Wi-Fi facility, modern classrooms, and library were available. Hostel quality was also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of good placements, facilities, and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 100 to 130 students get placed. The average package is 3 LPA to 8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Movate, Embedyour, Foxconn, Unlimited Innovation, Virtusa, Cognizant, and Accenture. About 60% of students got internships at companies like Infosys, ISRO, etc. Roles offered include Software Engineer, AI Intern, Data Analyst, Cloud, DevOps, and Data Science.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure. We have many classrooms and lab facilities. Everyone can access the Wi-Fi inside the college. The department is very good. The courses offered are really valuable. The food offered here is 8/10. Medical facilities are 10/10. Sports facilities are also 10/10.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Chose it for the atmosphere, stayed for the people.

content.Placements: Our placement process is still ongoing since it is only November, so the final numbers are not out yet. For now, around 20% of students get placed. More companies are still coming. The highest package for Marketing roles is about 7–8 LPA, while the average package ranges from 4–5 LPA. The minimum offers start around 3 LPA. Internships are compulsory for everyone because the internship viva is part of the semester examination, so almost 90% of students complete it on time. The main roles offered include Marketing, Finance, HR, Data Analytics, and Logistics.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Construction Engineering and Project Management - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This college is good at placement.

content.Placements: The college gives good placement opportunities. Around 80% of students get a great job offer, while 62% of students get internship offers at various companies. The highest package goes to 55 LPA, the lowest package offered is 4 LPA, and the average package is 8 LPA. L&T is the top recruiter of my college. The college is known for this type of placement offer, so this course in my college has a high demand in the market.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a beautiful campus. To enter the college, you strictly need a college ID card. Small breaks are given after each class. Sport facilities are available where you can play after college. The hostel rooms are very clean, and each room is shared by 4 to 5 students. The mess food is moderate to good.

admission_overview.title: B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: BSACIST admission 2025 is open. The college offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses such as BTech, BArch, BA, MTech, and many more. B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology offers an online mode of application. To be eligible for admission, candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. The college offers both merit and entrance-based admission to its UG and PG courses. Given below is more information about BSACIST admission along with course eligibility, selection criteria and admission process 2025:

eligibility_selection.title: B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: BSACIST admission to its courses is both merit and entrance-based. The college carries out an online mode of application for all the courses. B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology offers various UG and diploma courses in engineering, Architecture, Design, Management and others. The college accepts various entrance exam scores, such as NATA, JEE Main, GATE, TANCET and others for admission to some UG and PG courses. Further, the college also conducted entrance exams for admission to its UG and PG courses including CPGEE, CSBAT and others. However, the college offers admission for some courses based on last qualifying exam scores. Check out BSACIST course eligibility & selection criteria in the following table: Course

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 with a minimum 50% aggregate in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry from a recognised board
Class 12 in any stream with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 10 and Class 12 with Mathematics as one of the core subjects with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
BTech or equivalent degree in a relevant field with 50% aggregate from a recognised institute/university
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate in any discipline from a recognised institute/university
BArch with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised institute/university

faqs.answer: Candidates are selected for MArch course at B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology on the basis of merit of graduation. They must pass BArch with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised institute/university. This is also the eligibility criteria for MArch course at the institute.
faqs.question: How can I get selected for MArch course at BSACIST?

faqs.answer: On the official webiste of B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology, I could not find any information on the cutoff marks required in the JEE Main or Crescent College's entrance test, namely Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2024) for admission. However, as per the eligibility criteria mentioned on the official website of the college, students must have at least 50% scores in their Class 12 in the PCM subject combination to be eligible for this course.

admission_process.title: BSACIST Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: BSACISTadmission process 2025begins on the official website of the college. The college accepts and conducts various entrance exam scores such as JEE Main/ GATE/TANCET/CPGEE/ CAT/XAT/CMAT/ATMA/MAT/ GMAT/TANCET/CSBAT for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for admission to other courses, the college offers merit-based admission. Check below the step-by-step BSACIST admission process:

BSACIST releases its application form on its official website. Eligible candidates must apply online through the college's official website. It is necessary that eligible candidates have completed the entrance exam formalities and qualified for the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the college.

Admission to the courses is both merit-based and entrance-based. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to UG and PG courses. Further, for other courses, BSACIST offers merit-based admission.
After candidates get shortlisted, they are required to pay aBSACIST course feeto confirm their admission.

B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology feescomprise several components like tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges, and other charges. The course fee varies with different courses and course levels. B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology offers a large no. of seats for a wide range of courses. Candidates who qualify for the selection process must pay the tuition fees to confirm their seat. The seat intake might change, which totally depends on the institute. Below is theB.S. faqs.question: Are there any seat reservations at B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, After clearing the entrance exam you need to pay INR 50000 as an advance for admission which will be subtracted from your actual fee that you need to pay as a college fee.But a bitter fact is that they will not return you the money that you pay during admission.You must think twice or thrice before paying the admission fee,But there is a another way where you can hold your seat by paying some particular amount of money stating that you have a shortage of money.Not like other colleges in crescent all type of scholarships provided by either government or corporate organizations is accepted and if you are a Muslim then you will have an access to a tons of scholarships in the nation scholarship portal (NSP).

faqs.question: Where can a candidate check B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology cutoff 2023?
faqs.answer: A candidate can check B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology cutoff 2023 by visiting the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for the MCA programme at B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: the total intake capacity for the Master of Computer Application course is 60 seats  at B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology. The admission to the MCA program is based on the CGPA/Percentage obtained in the UG degree and performance in the Crescent PG Entrance Exam (CPGEE). The MCA programme is open to candidates with a bachelor's degree in Computer Applications/Computer Science/Engineering or a graduate degree with a subject of study in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Commerce with Mathematics at graduation level or class 12th level with at least 5.0 CGPA/50% of marks. The fee structure for the MCA program is as follows:Indian Nationals:Application Fee: INR 1,000Tuition Fee per Semester: INR 30,000Foreign Nationals:Application Fee: 15 DollarTuition Fee per Semester: 750 Dollar

placement_report.college_name: Crescent College Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Crescent College Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Crescent Institute of Science and Technology Engineering NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during BTech placements 2023 stood at INR 4.25 LPA . Further, a total of 463 students were placed and 36 students opted for higher studies out of total 561 students during BTech placements 2023. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.4 LPA . Further, a total of 118 students were placed out of 169 students during MBA placements 2023.

Earlier, 2022 placements data are available on the website. According to which, more than 1000 students were eligible for the placements and out of which over 700 students were placed by top recruiting companies. The institute has achieved 70% placement rate. Further, a total of 194 companies visited the campus during Crescent Institute of Science and Technology placements drive of 2022.

faqs.question: Is B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology good for placements?
faqs.answer: The placement rate is high at the B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology. The institute's placement rate is 70%. Over 1000 students met the eligibility requirements for placements in 2022, and top recruiting firms placed over 700 of those candidates. Additionally, 194 businesses came to the campus for the Crescent Institute of Science and Technology's 2022 placement drive. The offered salary ranges from 3 LPA for the lowest to 12 LPA for the greatest.

faqs.question: How are MCA placements at B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The MCA placements at B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology are quite good, according to the web search results. Some of the features of the MCA placements are: The average package offered to MCA students in 2022 was 4.5 LPA . The median package offered to MCA students in 2021 was 5.02 LPA . Some of the top recruiters of the MCA graduates are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Accenture, IBM, HCL, Oracle, Larson & Toubro, DELL, L&P, etc.

highlights.description: Crescent College is one of India’s top institutes. Eminent national ranking bodies have acknowledged it as a leading institute. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #151-200 in the Engineering category, #102-125 under Pharmacy, and #11-50 under Innovation. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in Crescent College rankings.

rankings.highlight: 4th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Chennai In 2023
4th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Chennai In 2025

nirf.description:
Crescent College has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Engineering' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Crescent College indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Engineering' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Crescent College's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Crescent College fell 18 ranks to #102 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

outlook.description:
Across the years, it is observed that Crescent College is consistently recognised as a highly-ranked institute in different categories by Outlook 2024 among other institutes by excelling in key areas such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, and many more.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

qs_world.description:
Crescent College has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the QS World University Rankings 2026. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Crescent College climbed 30 ranks to #721 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Crescent College climbed 21 ranks to #219 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

reviews.review_text: Our college has very good infrastructure. We have many classrooms and lab facilities. Everyone can access the Wi-Fi inside the college. The department is very good. The courses offered are really valuable. The food offered here is 8/10. Medical facilities are 10/10. Sports facilities are also 10/10.

reviews.review_heading: Chose it for the atmosphere, stayed for the people.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides really good facilities for students. Every classroom has a table and Wi-Fi connection, which makes online access and academic work much easier. We also have a well-equipped lab. This is especially useful because we have a semester focused on SAP, where we get hands-on learning. The classrooms are comfortable, with AC and good seating arrangements. The first-year setup is excellent, and the second-year rooms are equally good. Our library is one of the best parts of the dep...

reviews.review_heading: This college is good at placement.
reviews.review_text: The college has a beautiful campus. To enter the college, you strictly need a college ID card. Small breaks are given after each class. Sport facilities are available where you can play after college. The hostel rooms are very clean, and each room is shared by 4 to 5 students. The mess food is moderate to good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Crescent School of Law (B.S.Abdur Rahman University)
reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with everything, including the environment, facilities, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available 24/7 inside the campus, including in the library and computer labs. For medical students, research labs are also available. Classrooms have AC, and the hostels also have both AC and normal rooms with separate buildings for boys and girls inside the campus. A clinic is available 24/7 inside the campus within walking distance, and they provide an ambulance too. The food is also good in the hostel, and they conduct dance events and sports events for hotel students.

reviews.review_heading: Small and beautiful campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Well furnished labs were available with all required instruments and machinery. Library was present. Quality of hostel was okay. Food in the canteen and mess was average. Limited sports facility was present.

reviews.review_heading: It provided average placements in 2025. It has a great and lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: There are no complaints about the infrastructure and food. Classrooms and area are well-maintained. Labs are great, and Wi-Fi is good. We get non-veg food for 3 days a week, and there are no complaints. There is a daily cleaning. Restrooms and toilets are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the college infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very perfect. It looks like a foreign classroom. The hostel food is okay mostly non-veg. Medical facilities are also available but not too good. Sports and games are very well. Fencing is also here. Karate is also here, and mainly NCC is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: There was 24-hour Wi-Fi facility, well-established labs with proper equipment, qualified lab faculty, digital classrooms, and a well-maintained library with all necessary books. The food quality in the hostel mess and canteen was good. A 24-hour medical facility was available, along with a big ground for sports and an indoor stadium for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Transforming lives through education.
reviews.review_text: B. S. Abdur Rahman University has one of the best infrastructures that provides with comfortable and supportive learning environment. The campus is equipped with modern facilities including library labs and many more when it comes to the hostel it is somewhat bad because of no quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing. Labs have air-conditioned facilities. There are robotics classes as well. There are canteens, cafeterias, medical facilities, and sports and games fields for both indoor and outdoor. The campus has greenery. The library is accessible 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good in some blocks and weak in some blocks. Labs are well-maintained and useful to get trained practically as per the civil engineering department. There is a shortage of some classes. The library is well-maintained. I'm a day scholar.

reviews.review_heading: Really Good College with good placement but I feel fees is high.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not that good in college as we don't get range everywhere and sometimes it won't even be usable. Classrooms are pretty good, and even the library is good for students who prefer studying in a silent manner. The library even has many resources and even hostels are okay.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel accommodation and its room facilities are sanitized regularly. We are simply required to pay hostel fees which should be affordable and management would take care of all the facilities like mess, laundry, entertainment, and internet connectivity.

college_info.college_name: Crescent College

data.description: There are several hostels near B. S. Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology but very less PG's near college. In Urapakkam there were 5 to 6 PG's with wi-fi, AC and food facilities but the rent is too high. KPS women's hostel is situated near the college. PG's are available in Tambaram from where you need to travel 20 minutes to reach the college. By analyzing those scenarios we can conclude that those who prefer to study their graduate in crescent can chose to stay in the college hostel which provides good facilities and costs lesser than other PG's

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanskriti University offers PG and UG courses to students across the Management, Engineering, and several other streams. At the UG level, the university provides BTech, BSc, BPharma, and others. At the PG level, the university provides MPharma, MTech, MSc, MBA, and others. BTech is provided in 6 specialisations, namely Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cloud Technology & Information Security, Mechanical Engineering, and others. The university also provides PhD courses to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sanskriti University and their respective eligibility and Sanskriti University Mathura B Tech fees and other course fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Sanskriti University does not enrol students to the BTech programme directly without first passing the standard admission test. According to the information supplied, JEE Mains scores will determine admission to Sanskrit University's B.Tech programmes. No direct admission options are mentioned for B.Tech candidates. Other programs like MBA or Ph.D. may have exemptions from written exams for those who have already passed certain entrance exams, but these exemptions are on a case-by-case basis. Case basis as per university rules. So, if you want to do BA in Sanskriti University you have to clear JEE Mains Finals.
faqs.question: Can I join Sanskriti University directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes. Sanskriti University accepts JEE for admission to the B.Tech programme. The foundation for admission to the BTech curriculum is the attainment of valid JEE Mains entrance test scores. Admissions are granted not just on the basis of JEE but also on the merit of the qualifying test.
faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University accept JEE for B.Tech?

faqs.answer: A:    Sanskriti University offers MCA courses for the duration of two years, divided into four semesters, and offered in full-time mode. Additionally, the university also offers integrated BCA+MCA courses for the duration of four years. The eligibility criteria for the MCA course is candidates must complete a bachelor's degree in a relevant field with a minimum of 50%. For integrated BCA+ MCA courses, candidates are required to qualify the Class 12 with relevant subjects with at least an aggregate of 50%.
faqs.question: What is the Sanskriti University MCA duration?

faqs.answer: A:    For MCA at Sanskriti University, a candidate must give CUET-PG with a graduation score of 50% (45% for reserved category candidates). The total tuition fees for MCA range from INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 3.8 lakh. The average package provided by the university for the MCA course is around INR 4 Lacs as per recent data.

The Bachelor of Physiotherapy course is good. The future is bright. The university also provides the opportunity for patients to be treated by you.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good and the infrastructure is fantastic. I love it. Their labs, classrooms, and library facilities are also good. The hostels are neat and clean, and 2 or more beds are available in one room. The mess canteen provides good food for the students.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanskriti University Admission 2025

admission_process.title: Sanskriti University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sanskrit University offers UG and PG for admission 2025. Candidate's UG academic programmes determine their eligibility for postgraduate studies. For diploma courses, applicants must have finished Class 10 with at least 50%. Sanskrit University offers four years of full-time BTech in various Engineering specialisations.The candidates' performance on their qualifying exams determines their admission to these programmes.

For Sanskriti University admissions to various UG & PG courses, candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related toSanskriti University courseadmissions 2025:

Sanskriti University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process for Sanskriti University admissions 2025:

Applicants can obtain the application form from the official Sanskriti University website to start the admissions process. Candidates can send the completed form to the appropriate department at Sanskriti University in person or by mail. Candidates must submit their application form online with two copies of their online bank challan and a pay slip to complete the application and entrance exam costs.

Admission 2025 to Sanskrit University's UG and PG programmes is determined by entrance exams. For the applicable courses, candidates must be eligible to take admission exams at the state or university levels, such as the CAT or MAT. Furthermore, the undergraduate programmes provided by associated institutions are determined by the merit scores earned in the most recent qualifying test.

Following the conclusion of the selection stages, applicants take part in the course counselling process. The chosen applicants are then included on merit lists, which are released by Sanskriti University in several rounds. To reserve a place, those whose names are on the merit list must pay a certain amount.

faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University accept JEE for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sanskriti University accepts JEE for admission to the B.Tech programme. The foundation for admission to the BTech curriculum is the attainment of valid JEE Mains entrance test scores. Admissions are granted not just on the basis of JEE but also on the merit of the qualifying test.

faqs.question: Does Sanskriti University offer lateral entry admission to the BTech program?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sanskrit University provides lateral entry admission to its BTech curriculum. A minimum of 55% in a three-year diploma in the appropriate engineering is needed to be admitted to this curriculum. A number of engineering specialisations, including electrical, mechanical, computer science and engineering, civil, and electrical engineering, are available for lateral entry admission to the BTech curriculum at Sanskriti University. The duration of the BTech lateral entry programme is three years.

faqs.question: Can I join Sanskriti University directly?
faqs.answer: Sanskriti University does not enrol students to the BTech programme directly without first passing the standard admission test. According to the information supplied, JEE Mains scores will determine admission to Sanskrit University's B.Tech programmes. No direct admission options are mentioned for B.Tech candidates. Other programs like MBA or Ph.D. may have exemptions from written exams for those who have already passed certain entrance exams, but these exemptions are on a case-by-case basis. Ca

faqs.question: Is CUET exam registration open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Common University Entrance Test (CUET) 2026 registration commenced at cuet.nta.nic.in. NTA released the CUET 2026 notification on January 03 and reopened the window on February 23. Soon after the release of the CUET official notification, theCUET registration 2026process commenced online at the official website. Candidates willing to appear for the CUET 2026 exam must have completed complete the application form online. Additionally, before filling application form, candidates must make sure that they have fulfilled the prescribedCUET eligibility criteriato qualify for the entrance exam.

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, Sanskriti University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
It has been recognized that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'MBA (Private)' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Sanskriti University fell 64 ranks to #84 rank in the 'MBA (Private)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'BBA' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, Sanskriti University fell 5 ranks to #67 rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanskriti University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University has separate hostels for both boys and girls at present there are 5 hostels out of which 4 for boys and within campus and one is for girls which is off campus. Spacious rooms with necessary furniture are provide. 24*7 internet facility & water supply facility is available. other than that drinking water, facilities for both indoor and outdoor games and mess facility is provided. AC and non AC room is available for the students.

library.description: The library is well-stocked with more than 25,000 books. It subscribes to approximately 50 Indian and 25 foreign journals apart from e-journals and comprises of both national and international journal. Book bank facility is provided to the students. Digital library is linked to DELNET. It provides the facility of inter-connection of all libraries registered under DELNET scheme. This facilitates access to a wide range of book, journals, magazines, etc.The library has reprographic facility, reading hall,digital and webinar facilities.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience at Sanskriti University.
reviews.review_text: The university provide updated study model with advanced lab facilities and with high tech class room. The hostel provided by the university is very clean, and the mess of the university is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a strong background in management, come to Sanskriti.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a very well-developed infrastructure. The environment of the university is very green and clean. The Sanskriti University provides modern lab facilities to its students and all the basic facilities needed. The classrooms of the Sanskriti University are very well ventilated with modern facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is overall very good for students who want to learn new skills.
reviews.review_text: Sanskriti University provides well-developed and well-maintained infrastructure for BCA students. Classrooms are spacious and clean with basic teaching facilities like projectors and smart boards. There are also high-tech computer labs that provide practical learning experience to students.

reviews.review_heading: Good place to study with a lot of enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Courses are good, and my overall experience is positive. Students get enrolled in the course because of the beautiful environment and natural vibes. The department is friendly. Wi-Fi has good speed. Labs are good and well organized. Classrooms are good. Library is awesome and peaceful place.

reviews.review_heading: The university is good for exposure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and the infrastructure is fantastic. I love it. Their labs, classrooms, and library facilities are also good. The hostels are neat and clean, and 2 or more beds are available in one room. The mess canteen provides good food for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is good.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure with proper facilities, best library, best classroom with AC classes, best Wi-Fi facility. There are the best hostel facilities, the quality of food is available here, and a good mess and canteen. The college provides the best medical facilities, sports grounds, and better games.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure. Many students get placed here.
reviews.review_text: The university provides an excellent range of infrastructure that includes library facilities, a mess, and a canteen. It has good campus facilities. There is also a sports zone. There are separate zones for each class of students. There is a good place to study and a great environment.

reviews.review_heading: I think this is best for average students.
reviews.review_text: Our libraries, cafeteria, computer labs, and classrooms are digital. Hostel food is average, and sports fests are held. For medical needs, there's a wellness center and hospital on the second campus, but these facilities aren't utilized. The food available in the mess is average in taste but good in quality, while the canteen offers both good taste and quality.

reviews.review_heading: Best and management faculty members. Good placement and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: Best facilities were there like Wi-Fi, labs, and best classroom. Best food was provided in hostel mess and canteen. Medical facilities were available. Classrooms were best. Water and canteen facilities were the best. Sports ground was available. Games were played every day. For students, fans and air-coolers were available in any classroom.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskriti University in a positive way.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is the best and maintained. Some new blocks are ready for students in which new classrooms, labs, and the library are ready. There are two different areas of hostels, one for girls and the other for boys with all types of rooms and facilities. The college provides all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The experience I needed to explore was very satisfying. Even the infrastructure is very friendly.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very friendly and joyful. The classrooms are clean every block has its library and there are 6 computer labs and each lab has around 100 computers. Let's talk about the hostel, there are many options for the hostel room AC, non-AC, sharing rooms, and non-sharing rooms. The food quality is average and the hostel's nature is very excellent.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, 3 seaters to 6 seaters. We can choose anything and fee will be according to that. For 3 seaters and food fee is Rs 60,000 per year. Food is good sometimes not good enough. Everyone will have a table, chair, safe, and bed. Every room has a balcony. The main reason behind choosing this course is my interest in computer science, and the reason behind choosing this department is the placement and seniors/alumni (they are very helpful). Faculty members are also good here. All teachers...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and placements are really good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are of good quality, allowing for participation in all activities. The quality of facilities in the hostel, college playground, and so on, is good, and the labs and Wi-Fi in college were useful to students. The medical facilities they provide are good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college, and the environment is mind-blowing.
reviews.review_text: This university provided every kind of facility for students, like proper Wi-Fi connectivity, labs for practicals, classrooms with projectors, and a library with a peaceful environment. The mess food wasn't too good, but if we talk about the canteen, it was good. We also had a hospital inside our college for treatment and a gaming zone also.

reviews.review_heading: Sanskriti university college review .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. The Wi-Fi facility provided in the college and hostel is very poor. Computers do not work properly. Mess food is not good. Sports, games, and e-sports are conducted. There are no good quality products. Walls of the college building are damaged.
